subject: about vote-by-mail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
https://action.demsofstate.org/a/vbm-poll-nov22-1-1-1HORRIBLE: The Georgia GOP passed a law to restrict Vote-by-Mail [ https://action.demsofstate.org/a/vbm-poll-nov22-1-1]
URGENT POLL → [ https://action.demsofstate.org/a/vbm-poll-nov22-1-1] Do you support legislation to guarantee Vote-by-Mail in all 50 states? [ https://action.demsofstate.org/a/vbm-poll-nov22-1-1]YES >> [ https://action.demsofstate.org/a/vbm-poll-nov22-1-1] NO >> [ https://action.demsofstate.org/a/vbm-poll-nov22-1-1]
Here’s the deal.
There was a VERY important run-off election on December 6th in Georgia that EXPANDED the Democratic Senate Majority.
But Republicans in Georgia and other states strategically pass bills to restrict voters in a pathetic attempt to maintain or expand their power.
Because they know when Democrats are able to easily vote, Democrats win.
We think there should be a federal bill to guarantee Vote-by-Mail in EVERY state. Not just because it’s good for Democrats, but because it’s good for democracy.
That’s why we’re reaching out to Ohio Democrats to see if they agree. We want to see if there’s massive public support for National Vote-by-Mail legislation. We’ll have to submit the results of this poll into the record, so we need your completed response by 11:59PM.
Do you support legislation to guarantee Vote-by-Mail in all 50 states? [ https://action.demsofstate.org/a/vbm-poll-nov22-1-1]YES >> [ https://action.demsofstate.org/a/vbm-poll-nov22-1-1] NO >> [ https://action.demsofstate.org/a/vbm-poll-nov22-1-1]
Team DASS [ https://action.demsofstate.org/a/vbm-poll-nov22-1-1]
DASS is a national organization supporting the election of Democratic Secretaries of State who are committed to protecting and preserving voting rights and ballot access for all Americans through fair, honest, open, and accurate elections.
Help us fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda by pitching in today!
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=footer-button&amount=25]

name: DLCC Special Elections Team
subject: Six special elections you need to know about
body:
Our candidates are geared up and ready to start working, but special elections are often underfunded and overlooked by voters. | | |
---
| | We’re almost a week away from the first of SIX special elections in Pennsylvania and New Hampshire. **These next six races of 2023 are big opportunities for Democrats:**
* The February 7th races in Pennsylvania are **MUST-WIN** seats for Democrats.

* New Hampshire’s race is a **TOSSUP** that we must win to ensure we keep our razor-thin chamber margins.

* If we keep winning special elections in New Hampshire, we could **FLIP** the chamber sometime this year.

Our candidates are gearing up for a tough fight because special elections are notoriously unpredictable – earlier this month, our Democrat flipped his Virginia Senate seat by just _696 votes._ **That’s why we need your help to come together so we can build campaigns strong enough to meet this critical moment.** [Chip in $7 today to help state Democrats WIN in crucial special elections in Pennsylvania, New Hampshire, and beyond >> ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wllHyGNe2HDyIs5WdLo8tLZFkTvQ_D_sKMPxDAc898PH2zyZkVTvhMIhW8Ihh5Fkvvs5_OVjNHEYp5-tANzeqttVc_L6OCl3hOjHbmw_khEIfuqoK5X6nSwpdjNHDeN_ZcviIhjR0Ll6ScDWrb31LaJF7wrLrNtZ9WGH4Qnk7EPJo2IgJPhcYMBsVaBQ_CV_u8rcZXcAqNEvsysxaeTqvjuxn62l7wQh09IzhP7wp2ly8eSnHRxitXF7Lm4kWhJmxazuAIjDsVRw45pap-MVE0vSj1lYxWZnJ3n5shyzbMoB7nCsot66xWkwuX04ak_sv3g2MxS5J2NEZwGrRsYKSIpQ-NruTp37PbzflPSTHjpt_wGDtBGj31ulNezNJwtYwcG5eA1n52KyPBQUBwA8sHMPM_U8DHFF6ZkNPcCZ_bWw/3t2/yZcTEyAfSr-CcLKjA7fTYQ/h0/0tTWKDbvTcjGhHZDJvwanbRWXkICasUkOcIHV-Of10U) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

Republicans are in complete disarray – they’ve spent the last few years passing anti-LGBTQ+ legislation, prioritizing tax cuts for the ultra-rich, and denying science – instead of tackling _real_ issues that need _real_ solutions.
**Meanwhile, state Democrats are fighting tooth and nail to keep people safe from abortion bans, voting restrictions, gender discrimination, and so much more. The choice is clear, and now all that’s left to do is send your support before Election Day.**

clean_body: Our candidates are geared up and ready to start working, but special elections are often underfunded and overlooked by voters. | | | | | We’re almost a week away from the first of SIX special elections in Pennsylvania and New Hampshire. These next six races of 2023 are big opportunities for Democrats: The February 7th races in Pennsylvania are MUST-WIN seats for Democrats. New Hampshire’s race is a TOSSUP that we must win to ensure we keep our razor-thin chamber margins. If we keep winning special elections in New Hampshire, we could FLIP the chamber sometime this year. Our candidates are gearing up for a tough fight because special elections are notoriously unpredictable – earlier this month, our Democrat flipped his Virginia Senate seat by just 696 votes. That’s why we need your help to come together so we can build campaigns strong enough to meet this critical moment. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Republicans are in complete disarray – they’ve spent the last few years passing anti-LGBTQ+ legislation, prioritizing tax cuts for the ultra-rich, and denying science – instead of tackling real issues that need real solutions. Meanwhile, state Democrats are fighting tooth and nail to keep people safe from abortion bans, voting restrictions, gender discrimination, and so much more. The choice is clear, and now all that’s left to do is send your support before Election Day. Friend,

Our new MRC Business analysis reveals that **Soros specifically funneled at least $131,111,250 between 2016 and 2020 into 253 journalism and activist media groups worldwide** to spread his radical leftist ideas on abortion, Marxist economics, anti-Americanism, defunding the police, environmental extremism, and LGBT fanaticism.

Soros blew past the $100 million global media funding milestone again in just a four-year timespan.

And most people have no idea this is happening, Friend.

Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

**MRC is a conservative organization dedicated to exposing Soros ' dealings and working to hold him accountable for advancing his radical left-wing agenda around the globe.**

**That 's why I've set a goal to raise $20,000 before midnight on Friday to continue our investigation of George Soros.**

[](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkLFuwyAQhp8Gb7YwxiYdPCRx00qROlTq0C4WhiOhNeBgrCR9-mLL7VAJ3fAdfNz9UOcVo0XJKsoSWfOKK5CJrgkmBc4JwQXBlGayYwxvKiUE5OKhI4hiMFz3Gc-v3HvnTCacSc51QXMmaYlL4AwAZCVJxzaKCinhgW5w0tfnEIYRFVtEDvGMICYPGbcgXZglkRkvYlVBouIwBdOObvICUNGsfyFSzdiA1JOJeBllhYKbgeuTjXjZAKfR1kpnedDOtm4I2uhvaFdVdHs3ziaureonsALazrsv8PwE7RpD_it3NoAN0W1Fn6q3rTWv6vnjFtut7XWct_kHz1rGXZvHm9_TbXdMfC2Hq-57PVYshnhaQpyji2P3Wt1rxHaIkOUZIUtK5PJ-NX76NMendHeh6aV6MeXcJPtYw32Av5urJFsDIYg1P_eAm48)

It is easy to criticize Soros' politics, but as he told The New York Times, he is using his fortune to "bend" the arc of history "in the right direction," and he's using his global media clout to do it.

* **$131 Million to Advance Soros ' Leftist Global Media Agenda**

Soros spends hundreds of millions of dollars around the world in "private-sector investments to advance" his left-wing agenda on topics such as "racial equity" and "climate justice."

The organization states it has doled out $400 million to 54 countries as of April 2022, $9.3 million of which went toward "independent media."

* **Views Pushed by Soros-Funded Outlets Are Radical, Dystopian: **

Global outlet openDemocracy -- which received $1,633,457 from Soros between 2016-2020 -- published an op-ed from a "queer communism" activist who said the COVID-19 crisis "shows it's time to abolish the [nuclear] family."

The Soros-backed Free Press -- financed to the tune of $1,625,000 between 2016 and 2020 -- pressured the Federal Communications Commission to label former President Donald Trump's coronavirus briefings "hoaxes" and censure broadcasters that aired them.

[_**Help expose the extent of how Soros is influencing the globe by**_ _**clicking here**_ _**to send your support >>>**_](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkD1vwyAQhn8N3mLhswPp4CEfTYdInapI7WJhOCe0BhyM89FfX2y5HSqhG56Dh7sXy4zxIl9yVvBElYKJBlWiS6CQ0wyA5kCLIlU153TFGikxk081kIKiEbpNRXYT3jtnUulMci6XdZ5RbLgUStRPjVAMVyAkUC6UzJcsactzCF1P8jWBfTw9ysFjKiwqF0ZJZMbLWJugSL4fgql6N3iJJN_NfxFgIzao9GAinkaZoRSmE_pkI542oItoq5SzImhnK9cFbfQ3VrMqur3rR5PQtmkHtBKr2rsv9OKE1RxD9it3NqAN0W1luzjuj_fL2_p6_YjtyrY6zrv7B89axV13z3e_Ldb1IfGl6m66bXXPeAzxNIU4RhfHbnXzKAnfEIDpGcCUElzeb8YPn-bwsthcisWFvZrl2IRtrOHR4d_NWZLOgQDhux_AKJwg)

* **253 Journalism/Media Groups Tied to Soros: **

MRC Business discovered that Soros funded at least 253 organizations across the world that focus on news and activist media. **A number of these groups wield massive power over the flow of information in international politics. **

Project Syndicate claimed its commentaries were published 20,393 times in 156 countries in 2021 in more than 66 different languages.

OpenDemocracy claimed it "attracts more than 11 million visits per year" and has projects published "in Russian, Spanish and Portuguese as well as English."

**The Poynter Institute 's Soros-funded International Fact-Checking Network controls global fact-checking for 100 organizations and influences much of Big Tech content and social media with that power.**

[](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxVkMtugzAQRb_G7ILMQHC6YJFH00qRsmuldoOMPRC3fhBjlKZfX4NopUrWlXzHczxzscpKVuRrVhYskRUveYsyURVQyGkGQHOgRZHKhjG6KVshMBMPDZCCouFKpzy7ce-dM6lwJrnEPto8YDv1ChEvLGq-oZTLjDMGPNHVJYR-IPmWwDGeAcXoMeUWpQsTJHrGi6htkCQ_jsHUgxu9QJIflr8IlJNtUKrRRHseZTEFNz1XnY32vAFdRVotneVBOVu7PiijvrFeUJHt3TCRuLKtHtEKrBvvPtHzDuslhuwX7mxAGyLbCr2y76_rZ9O97M6xXFut5FT4b16UjLseHr_8vtg2p8RXsr8prdVQshhiN4c4RRfH1qq9V4TtCMDcBjCnBNe3m_Hjhzk9rXbXYnUtz2Y9FWEfNdx7_Hu5QNIlECDs8ANvdpog)

It's time for far-Left billionaires to be held accountable for their actions.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media.****Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's trust in the left-wing media -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore. **

Now we're attacking the Left and exposing how they're pushing their radical agenda of abortion, Marxist economics, anti-Americanism, defunding the police, environmental extremism, and LGBT fanaticism.

Friend, Our new MRC Business analysis reveals that Soros specifically funneled at least $131,111,250 between 2016 and 2020 into 253 journalism and activist media groups worldwide to spread his radical leftist ideas on abortion, Marxist economics, anti-Americanism, defunding the police, environmental extremism, and LGBT fanaticism. Soros blew past the $100 million global media funding milestone again in just a four-year timespan. And most people have no idea this is happening, Friend. Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is a conservative organization dedicated to exposing Soros ' dealings and working to hold him accountable for advancing his radical left-wing agenda around the globe. That 's why I've set a goal to raise $20,000 before midnight on Friday to continue our investigation of George Soros. It is easy to criticize Soros' politics, but as he told The New York Times, he is using his fortune to "bend" the arc of history "in the right direction," and he's using his global media clout to do it. $131 Million to Advance Soros ' Leftist Global Media Agenda Soros spends hundreds of millions of dollars around the world in "private-sector investments to advance" his left-wing agenda on topics such as "racial equity" and "climate justice." The organization states it has doled out $400 million to 54 countries as of April 2022, $9.3 million of which went toward "independent media." Views Pushed by Soros-Funded Outlets Are Radical, Dystopian: Global outlet openDemocracy -- which received $1,633,457 from Soros between 2016-2020 -- published an op-ed from a "queer communism" activist who said the COVID-19 crisis "shows it's time to abolish the [nuclear] family." The Soros-backed Free Press -- financed to the tune of $1,625,000 between 2016 and 2020 -- pressured the Federal Communications Commission to label former President Donald Trump's coronavirus briefings "hoaxes" and censure broadcasters that aired them. 253 Journalism/Media Groups Tied to Soros: MRC Business discovered that Soros funded at least 253 organizations across the world that focus on news and activist media. A number of these groups wield massive power over the flow of information in international politics. Project Syndicate claimed its commentaries were published 20,393 times in 156 countries in 2021 in more than 66 different languages. OpenDemocracy claimed it "attracts more than 11 million visits per year" and has projects published "in Russian, Spanish and Portuguese as well as English." The Poynter Institute 's Soros-funded International Fact-Checking Network controls global fact-checking for 100 organizations and influences much of Big Tech content and social media with that power. It's time for far-Left billionaires to be held accountable for their actions. When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media.**Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's trust in the left-wing media -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore. Now we're attacking the Left and exposing how they're pushing their radical agenda of abortion, Marxist economics, anti-Americanism, defunding the police, environmental extremism, and LGBT fanaticism. Can you help us continue our investigation into George Soros? Click any link below to help MRC reach our goal of $20,000 before midnight on Friday. subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with fo
# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztovvg0m9euikthhiqhcb1n5v34b05tameagcvs0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpgeaoj6c5h2bs). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zq1pgt04vevstbk5c2gbblm6q323uvvgobho4elo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpgeaoj6c5h2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0mra0frsli43onm0cbs5dq01msne862cpv077c0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpgeaoj6c5h2bs) Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z90eg1j08fiaoao6ev1dc7649bfsolvjrsr5s7co_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpgeaoj6c5h2bs) You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6quq6t936ulnf1vv8cbbccd4cs5hsd1b5raj790_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpgeaoj6c5h2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsuphbbqklfgnokektvkbheg43tcjd4qli11qt30_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpgeaoj6c5h2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmcl7q5ds6kgio5u3cnvmo9uh5je6dik2ae5cs68_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpgeaoj6c5h2bs) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters **More Raving Reviews From Customers!** | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."
---|---

Real reviews from real customers. Sometimes customers receive a free product to test or as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. For more information see [Terms & Conditions](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb2icj2iu2vo5r0kpamn1jiupf7cv3krmajrprno_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpgeaoj6c5h2bs).

I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings. ---|--- | Ken K. I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal. ---|--- | Justin A. My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great. ---|--- | Gary M. I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed. ---|--- | John H. We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when." ---|--- Real reviews from real customers. Sometimes customers receive a free product to test or as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. For more information see . subject: How We Win
body:
I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win!
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z42g6mol8tcuo72mrfcvcdna45d3mpp20ec74gio_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpgeaoj6cph2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win!_ **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdf715q6803le7uq1lsi71tm20klu22c5epmhgj8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpgeaoj6cph2bs)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za8iebn3916gvej308n6tegbkv34c5k6vp5ep4i0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpgeaoj6cph2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp63alq743jijjhtji92t7klpvp50d6qkcc7tb80_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpgeaoj6cph2bs)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z53bvpr61fjrqp856474516bnqvuscpp3oc5aki0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpgeaoj6cph2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. name: Great America Update
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7541%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=ZB2VGgqw5TOGNwXaE2wzKQ&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78753%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=R7mauSSN%2boqhny4zFBsU%2fg&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78754%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vuQFOvMD%2fJ0fKUkBqmZlOg&sysid=1)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78754%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vuQFOvMD%2fJ0fKUkBqmZlOg&sysid=1)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7541%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=ZB2VGgqw5TOGNwXaE2wzKQ&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7541%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=ZB2VGgqw5TOGNwXaE2wzKQ&sysid=1)

subject: America's Biggest Threat In 2023
body:
BREAKING – A brutal attack on North Carolina's power grid has left 45,000 residents in the dark and scrambling for a way to st
# America's Biggest Threat In 2023
**BREAKING** - A brutal attack on North Carolina's power grid has left 45,000 residents in the dark and scrambling for a way to stay safe. In 2022 alone there have been over 70 attacks on the power grid with reports of six in Florida, five in Oregon and Washington. And according to national security experts, this trend is only going to continue. As America's power grid comes under increasing attack, will your city be the next to fall victim to this growing threat? It's a harsh reality, but one that we must face head on. **National security experts warn there is an imminent threat to the national electric grid.** In fact, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in nationwide blackouts for up to 18 months. Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment the power fails. Lights all over the country would go out, throwing people into total darkness. Without access to a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer would spoil. Your well couldn't pump any fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. You wouldn't be able to operate your radio or TV or charge your cell phone, so you'd feel isolated and cut off from your friends and family. This is not some crazy doomsday theory, but a very real and imminent threat. Retired CENTCOM General Lloyd Austin has warned that it's not a question of if, but when. [**When massive blackouts strike the U.S.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z441202rjr2svjmc3efj0snj6vdsu6ms96snth40_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpge1o72cph2bs) Dr. Peter Pry, former CIA official and Chief of Staff of the Congressional EMP Commission, and other top national security experts have raised the alarm for years about the most vulnerable aspect of infrastructure in the United States: **Our crumbling electric grid.** When our electric grid fails, it will be like watching America have a heart attack right before your eyes, because when the heart stops pumping, everything shuts down and the patient flat lines. Our enemies could cripple our great country in a matter of minutes. Former CIA Director James Woolsey warns that an attack on America's infrastructure would, "blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year killing 9 of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse." Our enemies could just sit back and watch as we self-destruct through looting, rioting and the targeting of police officers. **Our government is woefully unprepared.** It seems like the government has been fixated on taking more and more away from people who worked hard to earn it, while doing virtually nothing to secure our nation's infrastructure. They've ignored dire warnings from national security experts about the grid's vulnerability to physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyber-attacks. **"Our death toll would be staggering"** reports FOXNews. We are all fine when the power goes out for a few hours or even days. But an extended blackout would be devastating. Will you be prepared for a crisis that could take months or even years to recover from? How will you stay safe, warm and protected? [**What will you do when the power goes out?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zandobh5msf4g4a5biudn62tiht7k1ept38tn8d0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpge1o72cph2bs) **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without** gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zt40i35u4rbdj7alfpeth9474hjhfjkp0pujacp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpge1o72cph2bs) **It's a breakthrough NEW device that generates continuous watts of clean, quiet and FREE renewable power.** That's enough to power lights for safety and comfort, your computer, TV or cell phone. Even small appliances like a small freezer or critical medical device that will sustain your family during a power outage. [**You can see a live demo of it in action here**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4drlv04a5dmddvo1oqs22mtkedo0dnsc9k16t5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpge1o72cph2bs) Imagine how much peace of mind you'll have right away when you get your own. Because if a crisis hits and your family asks, "When will the power come back on?" you'll calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty of electricity to power the critical items. You'll be able to power lights, preserve food, recharge cell phones and computers or keep critical medical devices going. Your home will be a little island of light and warmth in a storm - be it natural or man-made. Listen, nobody can predict the future. None of us know exactly when or how the next attack will hit our electrical grid. But from everything we see, it could be devastating. Watch this video and find out for yourself... **[Click here to see it in action!](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zma74gm2mkenic44moguq4atcpkc6m98cikofq40_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpge1o72cph2bs)** To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters
---

name: American Defense News
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”
| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5lrqkca4sn0hbp07ckqu0l1l8818tqlcn6coibg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpge9pr4cdh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcf815iogvdl097o6un4ai8v8g2pi66hndo3l3to_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpge9pr4cdh2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z39358t0tkbgih3jkcr3bjf6a914cs5busm28v1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpge9pr4cdh2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. * my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... name: Kari Lake
subject: Even the Democrats don’t believe this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc
body:
It’s a disgrace.

| [ ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvppls26mir0moaiie8hrumdailr9q3a6422lu28_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpie0or2cdh2bs)

---
Patriot,

No one in their right mind believes that Katie Hobbs won the election — even 69% of DEMOCRATS in Maricopa County believe Americans have been deprived of the right to vote in this election.

**So much fraud has already been uncovered, but it will take more time to reveal the true scale of the corruption that influenced our election.** **[We just need to hold the line.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjgna5n0mdghg7cgaq9mdluje52nf9m08o218lv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpie0or2cdh2bs)**

**The Fake News Media is painting me as a villain because the establishment has directed them to crush our movement. They want to make asking questions a crime.**

**[It doesn’t matter who’s against us.

As long as I’m still breathing, I will not stop uncovering the truth.

](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze5d64uv2falbfu3gtvp1vmsptnjq0cjciosubfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpie0or2cdh2bs)** | [**JOIN THE FIGHT!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi3ledj33heige71c9nl5p8c8bdlsujvssdfb2k8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpie0or2cdh2bs)

name: American Briefing
subject: Your invitation: National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”
| | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zd0jokiq0pcdh0krri185r5ei176amvp9c8hu8eo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpie8pb4cph2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbbcjd9f5vog3bac8ulkte7n6c0pcmccsb5lr3o0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpie8pb4cph2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zai1takh454in7epsfote3gnthnqbldi8c9f8i90_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpie8pb4cph2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Briefing, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanbriefing.com/prefs/9z2z8u39aue9foe5echkosft25f5di4fd2q3541u0jo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zl90u3t4395vvo2jj2o7rqk2ujn15gca4m73t008_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpie8pb4cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: 4Patriots
subject: NEW 8-Pound Solar Generator is HERE!
body:
"Weird" 8-Pound Solar Device Could Save Your Life in a Dangerous Blackout
# "Weird" 8-Pound Solar Device
Could Save Your Life in a
Dangerous Blackout
**Our #1 Most Requested Item Finally
Back In Stock, Inventory Limited!** Hello I'm Cade Courtley, former Navy SEAL, Platoon Commander, sniper and author of the _SEAL Survival Guide._ The last two years has taught us that it's not IF you need a backup plan... **it's WHEN.** A deadly pandemic, dangerous blackouts sweeping the nation, storms, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest and crumbling power grids. It's sad, but facts are facts. Crisis mode has become the new normal. And you see the need to protect yourself and your family. So let me be clear: **One of the best ways to protect your safety and comfort is to guarantee you're always fully ready, even when the power goes out.** Nothing feels more vulnerable than that split second when you realize you're sitting in a dangerous blackout. All your critical devices are now on borrowed time. All your critical communications, comfort and protection, suddenly called into question. That's what happened after Hurricane Ida when thousands of families faced being without power... for WEEKS. **You simply must have a backup power plan, no matter your situation or budget.** Well now you can... Because for the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get a breakthrough NEW solar device... That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's **_safe to use inside_** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run. But if you want one, you better hurry... Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market. And now that these next batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long. You're among the first to know about...
# The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick
Finally... a Mini Solar Generator
that Never Needs Gas and that
Costs Less than an iPhone!
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc3dfotbuqavjhpfr8s85sbvargans7jgo8unr50_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpie4ob2cdh2bs) [**YES! There's an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqa5r0oshbm0hcaan5ep8tor7t8igjn0f487nbso_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpie4ob2cdh2bs) Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more! You'll be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... **And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes. [**You also get $243.90 of FREE Gifts today!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziuvqs3jgde79u8roqufpj7lqc31qfs1p4qm1ufg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpie4ob2cdh2bs)
* Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included
* and more!

That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**The Patriot Power Sidekick
Is An Essential Part of
Your Preparedness Plan!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0jaibke83s63e2995h7ra7t5nkh624c8hsc0ak0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpie4ob2cdh2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2457hqk6tvjcpmoob9vb86urc6mt5jbq5it5k48_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpie4ob2cdh2bs) _"I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere - very light!"_ _Craig W.
Police Officer
_ [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr76p02vqpqeuh8894fgvotln9nj2lcu702jv9og_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpie4ob2cdh2bs) | | **Rita L.** This product is so versatile, and at only 8 lbs, my grandchildren can get it. We had many trees down from a storm. The guys kept having to refill their gas powered chainsaws. My husband came out with this "little" box and his electric chainsaw. They laughed and said a long electric cord would be too dangerous. My husband calmly hooked up his Sidekick and made short work at lopping off the branches and then walked through the path he made. It lasted longer than the gas 'polluting' machines. Very grateful you have made this available to buy at an affordable price.
---|---
| **Steve G.** Peace of mind for years. I purchased this product to provide power to run a box fan in the summer and lights in the winter. I can use this product every day for over four years as it can be recharged up to 2,000 times. It won't make noise that draws attention and can create comfort in a difficult situation. Best of all, it's portable.
---|---
| **Thomas B.** Saved my CPAP machine during the winter storms. I just survived the ice storm, the freeze and the power outage in Texas using my 4Patriots products. I was most happy about my Patriot Power Sidekick. It's quiet. It's clean. I was able to deploy the solar panels on the dashboard of my van, it charged up. And then that night I plugged in my CPAP machine and it ran it all night long. With enough to charge my phone in the morning.
---|---
| **Jana H.** Portable power was a blessing when the grid failed us. I didn't think I'd need this but I needed it shortly after receiving it. This past February was the worst freeze that we, in Texas, have seen in a long time. Our power grid failed big time. We were without power for a couple of days. This product was a blessing. We were able to have a light and a small portable TV. I highly recommend this product and the company that sells it.
---|---
| **Allan D.** Patriot Power Sidekick to the rescue. We brought our new Patriot Power Sidekick with us on our last camping trip and it was a blessing. Our primary use was to power an air pump to easily fill up our air mattress for a comfortable night's sleep. One night we had a pinhole leak in the air mattress, so we just kept the Sidekick inside the tent hooked up to the air pump and ran it for a few minutes about every 3 hours to keep it fully inflated. It's quiet and powerful, and we will have it with us on every camping trip!
---|---
| **Chris S.** Power out, no problem. Recently had a power outage due to some crazy storms. I use my phone for everything. Having the sidekick charged up and charging my nearly dead phone meant I was able to have my alarm and get to work on time. Thank you for this compact, lightweight and fume free portable charging/light station available for when I needed it the most!
---|---
| **Richard B.** Well worth it! This is one of the items that made me a loyal customer. I never was a big fan on solar-powered anything. At the same time I've been in enough situations to know any type of a generator is necessary when you live in a more rural setting. Especially when gas prices go through the roof. I purchased the Sidekick and as soon as it arrived I unpacked it and plugged it into a lamp and left it plugged in all evening. I was impressed how little it took from the battery! After 3 hours the Sidekick was still at 98% fully charged. I'm looking forward to having two Sidekicks!
---|---
| **Frank S.** We have been looking for quite a while for something like this. The deal with the solar panels included was something not to pass up! We both have sleep apnea and use c/bipap machines for sleep. The power went out recently and the sidekick worked great. As a test we ran the Sidekick on the humidifier and it ran about 7 hours! It's a small humidifier. That's not bad for that type of application. Cannot wait till camping season comes along! We highly recommend this product.
---|---
[**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpt85bl0cd2er7brgqgf8pjno80202suqi53a228_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpie4ob2cdh2bs)
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2zugvj4vh0u457scrkbbfuomv77es3jugfau6fk4o).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj3271cfcmqp9fepq91en25qit2ai0qvic9v8oc0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c5j69oj1c9hm49fg)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: BREAKING NEWS: He's In! According to CBS News, Ruben Gallego's getting into the race for Arizona's U.S. Senate seat in 2024, and we're so here for it!
body:
Gallego will run for Arizona’s Senate seat!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb4310fcc-2902-49f3-948d-9b9b0efd1326/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _**BREAKING NEWS: **__**He's In! According to CBS News, Ruben Gallego's getting into the race for Arizona's U.S. Senate seat in 2024, and we're so here for it!**_ **_Gallego, as we previously told you, was BUILT for this race. A young, progressive, Latino, veteran in a state trending leftward, with a large Latino/a population and a large number of veterans. He reflects the state both politically and demographically. _** _Democrats swept Arizona statewide races in 2022, including electing Governor Katie Hobbs, and we've won the last two Senate and Secretary of State races, as well as Biden's win there in 2020._ _Gallego is a hard worker, great campaigner, charismatic and a top fundraiser. Once Kyrsten Sinema betrayed the Democratic Party in both her voting and then formatlly by leaving the party, **Gallego has always been the best chance we have to hold this Senate seat.**_ [**_Can you join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Ruben Gallego's about-to-launch campaign for the U.S. Senate?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T069d6892-595f-4fc0-9249-a3f9105ec90b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tedd51a69-0eaa-4a11-af5a-4a9d075fa6d0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _So, we have a choice. Kari Lake--a certifiable nut who continues to claim she won an election she LOST, even as it puts election workers' lives in danger, has publicly talked of running and could win. Kyrsten Sinema, who meets for hours each week with donors, corporate chieftains and lobbyists, but hasn't held a townhall for those not writing her checks, could prove a spoiler by running as an independent._ **_Or we get 1000% behind Gallego and get him the necessary resources he needs to win NOW, and win this race with a great candidate who perfectly fits the state, one on a growing streak of electing Democrats. All the polling shows him just about tied with Lake in a three-way race. If Sinema doesn't run, his path gets even easier. But none of this happens if we don't start building his profile statewide RIGHT NOW._** [**_Can you join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Ruben Gallego's about-to-launch campaign for the U.S. Senate?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdb1b499b-ba71-4693-985c-f0a2ca2cfb3f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _I can't accurately expres how excited I am about Gallego's impending run.. I met him once, years ago, before he was even in Congress. I thank you all for supporting this incredible public servant in his run for the U.S. Senate._ Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3863acae-2432-4b93-a2f0-fa3aafe9f987/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|

---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/gallegoannouncing-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7cbfaaff-9cf2-4b5b-bf73-74e48513cc30/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:

Patriot,

No one in their right mind believes that Katie Hobbs won the election — even 69% of DEMOCRATS in Maricopa County believe Americans have been deprived of the right to vote in this election.

**So much fraud has already been uncovered, but it will take more time to reveal the true scale of the corruption that influenced our election.** **[We just need to hold the line.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7u6521qlv5hsj6en0d8hvipusnu5k6prgd52vqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpie2oj2cth2bs)**

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: 50 years since Roe. 6 months without it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
In the past six months, we have seen the dire consequences of what happens when politicians get in the way of life-saving medical decisions.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57629764/388591182/-1511406121?refcode=em_fr_2023.01.22_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzA2NDQ1My01YzlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IFJJXqfCxhaEc-S8DNXED29NlDWGKH4eplpHIfLjykc=) Derek, it was almost six months ago that the Supreme Court ended the constitutional right to an abortion by overturning _Roe v. Wade_. **Today, on the 50th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ , I proudly assert that reproductive rights are fundamental human rights, and I vow to never stop fighting for the rights of every woman and girl in America.**

**In the past six months, we have seen the dire consequences of what happens when politicians get in the way of life-saving medical decisions.** The radical right claimed their abortion bans would save lives – but the reality is women and girls have suffered.

Wade. Today, on the 50th anniversary of Roe v. Wade , I proudly assert that reproductive rights are fundamental human rights, and I vow to never stop fighting for the rights of every woman and girl in America. In the past six months, we have seen the dire consequences of what happens when politicians get in the way of life-saving medical decisions. The radical right claimed their abortion bans would save lives – but the reality is women and girls have suffered. Derek, this is just the beginning. Kevin McCarthy and the radical right have already passed anti-abortion legislation that would criminalize women and doctors, and we know they’re gearing up to pass a nationwide abortion ban. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = With you in solidarity, Chris | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran representing Pennsylvania's 17th District in Congress. He's a champion for our unions, and he's fighting to guarantee good healthcare for every American, taking on corporate power, and advocating for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. = | = = | Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress Chris Deluzio for Congress PO Box 16210 Pittsburgh, PA 15242 United States Chris Deluzio is a United States Veteran. subject: Today, we would have celebrated Roe v. Wade’s 50th anniversary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57630949/388596238/265476937?code=jtk970-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGZmNzhkYy01ZDlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KAFaz9xC2zK-v-S9Eu5YwBtYBL4MygM3PfrHSLPZkBc=)

| | Today would have been the 50th anniversary of Roe v. Wade.
**Instead, millions of Americans are without the right to reproductive freedom.**

**[Sign my petition to demand that states protect our reproductive rights!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57630950/388596240/-1920424118?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk970-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGZmNzhkYy01ZDlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KAFaz9xC2zK-v-S9Eu5YwBtYBL4MygM3PfrHSLPZkBc=&emci=9a596bce-4998-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=8dff78dc-5d9a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
---
| | [Sign the petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57630951/388596242/-1920424118?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk970-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGZmNzhkYy01ZDlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KAFaz9xC2zK-v-S9Eu5YwBtYBL4MygM3PfrHSLPZkBc=&emci=9a596bce-4998-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=8dff78dc-5d9a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)
---
**Peter, for the first time in half a century, millions of Americans entered the new year without the right to reproductive freedom.**
Millions of people have had the power to decide whether or not they are ready to start or grow a family – perhaps the biggest decision one can make in their lifetime – stripped from them by lawmakers who will never find themselves in a similar situation.

Peter, it enrages me to think about all the people who have already had their lives forever altered by the fall of Roe, but together, we can protect others from this same fate.
**That’s why I vow to never stop working toward a future where all people have even _more_ reproductive rights than Roe v. Wade provided, and I hope you’ll join me.**

**[I’m looking for 5,000 fearless fighters to sign my petition to _demand_ that states protect our reproductive rights before midnight tonight, but I’m still missing yours, Peter. Will you sign my petition right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57630953/388596245/-1920424118?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk970-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGZmNzhkYy01ZDlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KAFaz9xC2zK-v-S9Eu5YwBtYBL4MygM3PfrHSLPZkBc=&emci=9a596bce-4998-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=8dff78dc-5d9a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57630954/388596248/-1920424118?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk970-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGZmNzhkYy01ZDlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KAFaz9xC2zK-v-S9Eu5YwBtYBL4MygM3PfrHSLPZkBc=&emci=9a596bce-4998-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=8dff78dc-5d9a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)
---
In the months since Roe v. Wade was overturned, I have fought tooth and nail to make New York a safe haven for all those seeking abortion care. I fought in court against state laws that outlawed abortion with no exceptions, convened a task force to assist reproductive health care providers and patients, and called for the creation of an abortion fund so that anyone seeking an abortion in the nation can have a safe place to do so.

**But, Peter, we cannot stop until reproductive freedom is restored for all. That’s why, on what would have been Roe v. Wade’s 50th anniversary, I’m calling on you to join the fight for reproductive freedom with me.**
**[Will you please take 30 seconds to add your name to my petition to demand that states protect our reproductive rights? Together, we can ensure that every person has the right to abortion care.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57630955/388596250/-1920424118?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk970-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGZmNzhkYy01ZDlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KAFaz9xC2zK-v-S9Eu5YwBtYBL4MygM3PfrHSLPZkBc=&emci=9a596bce-4998-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=8dff78dc-5d9a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Sign the petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57630956/388596254/-1920424118?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk970-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGZmNzhkYy01ZDlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KAFaz9xC2zK-v-S9Eu5YwBtYBL4MygM3PfrHSLPZkBc=&emci=9a596bce-4998-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=8dff78dc-5d9a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)
---
Thank you for standing with me to defend reproductive rights for every last person.

Letitia

name: ICYMI News
subject: “What happened to my country?”
body:
It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ide

| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpbege1o6aibnhapg3cikhukf62klh88d9b520k0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpie6o32cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, **" The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism."**
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhlm9ukp1v2npfhgh1h668uhavjpfmbtm9soopu0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpie6o32cjh2bs)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv1t3d5fep5kdong04hln66pq6095muq31lkk2qg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpie6o32cjh2bs)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

subject: What are they hiding?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz**
body:
Dear Peter,

Joe Biden is keeping all 14,000 hours of footage from January 6 under lock and key for a reason.

Biden and his regime prosecutors know if Americans see the complete picture of what happened that day, it will exonerate our patriots.

**The full video will reveal how many FBI informants operated on the ground during the FEDSURRECTION and what role they played in inciting violence.**

Attorney General Merrick Garland and his henchmen seized on January 6 to crush the MAGA movement once and for all.

And releasing the tapes will destroy Joe Biden's lies about Trump supporters being enemies of the state.

**I stepped into the belly of the beast on CNN to explain why releasing the tapes is so important.**

**[Please take a few moments to watch](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61409129:WwwmGoDLN:m:1:2365227053:830C02EA46EDB0DBE8D0BFE4163278EF:r).**
