**And I need your help to fight back, so chip in today and help combat the D.C. cartel's scheme to suppress the truth about January 6.** [**JOIN THE FIGHT TO RELEASE THE TAPES
>> CHIP IN TODAY <<**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61409129:WwwmGoDLN:m:1:2365227053:830C02EA46EDB0DBE8D0BFE4163278EF:r) I led the fight in Congress to expose the Russia collusion hoax.

And when Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi tried to impeach President Trump over the Ukraine sham, I was right there on the front lines to stop them.

**Now that Republicans hold the majority in Congress, I will sit at the top of the spear in obliterating the regime lies about January 6.**

But that will only happen if you help me release the tapes.

Conservatives won a promise from Speaker McCarthy to make all 14,000 hours of footage from January 6 public.

**So please,[watch my interview](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61409129:WwwmGoDLN:m:1:2365227053:830C02EA46EDB0DBE8D0BFE4163278EF:r) on why it's crucial Americans get a chance to see ALL the video from January 6.**

**[And chip in to help fight back against the regime's hiding the truth about what happened that day from the American people](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61409129:WwwmGoDLN:m:1:2365227053:830C02EA46EDB0DBE8D0BFE4163278EF:r).** **[HELP MATT GAETZ FIGHT BACK
CHIP IN BELOW TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61409129:WwwmGoDLN:m:1:2365227053:830C02EA46EDB0DBE8D0BFE4163278EF:r)** [** CHIP IN $10 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61409129:WwwmGoDLN:m:1:2365227053:830C02EA46EDB0DBE8D0BFE4163278EF:r) [** CHIP IN $25 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61409129:WwwmGoDLN:m:1:2365227053:830C02EA46EDB0DBE8D0BFE4163278EF:r) [** CHIP IN $50 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61409129:WwwmGoDLN:m:1:2365227053:830C02EA46EDB0DBE8D0BFE4163278EF:r) [** CHIP IN $100 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61409129:WwwmGoDLN:m:1:2365227053:830C02EA46EDB0DBE8D0BFE4163278EF:r) [** CHIP IN $250 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61409129:WwwmGoDLN:m:1:2365227053:830C02EA46EDB0DBE8D0BFE4163278EF:r) [** CHIP IN NOW >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61409129:WwwmGoDLN:m:1:2365227053:830C02EA46EDB0DBE8D0BFE4163278EF:r) _Sincerely,_

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans. To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, " The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism." | | In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions. You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below: I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today. body:

---
| Fellow Patriot, As a dedicated conservative, I've always remained committed to putting the best interests of the American people first. And that's why I'm leading the fight to hold bureaucrats accountable and demand moderates and Democrats do too. We've made our demands clear and have already accomplished so much because of your support...but now we need to ramp up our efforts. **So I 'm taking on the IRS, calling for lower taxes for all Americans, and fighting to preserve innocent life.** I'm working as hard as I can, **[but I need your help to make sure Congress hears our message and gets these things done.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zac2u57v9sgia6lsp9410mb6d1tpfpn4rutg9qao_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpie6o31c9h2bs)** | | | | [DEMAND ACTION](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3sfjp4rudrjfq6oeqs802vmtp3a9ubs1fkeb13g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpie6o31c9h2bs)
---
**The IRS is a bloated bureaucracy that wastes billions of dollars every year while stifling economic growth and violating the privacy of American citizens.**

We need to put an end to this and give hard working Americans the freedom to keep more of their own money.

At the same time, we must also work to protect the lives of the unborn. Every human life is precious and should be protected under law.

**We cannot stand idly by while Democrats make it easier to take innocent lives.**

That's why I am asking for your support. With your donation, we can fight to defund the IRS, lower our income taxes, and defend the rights of the unborn with our new Republican Majority.

**[So please, help me put pressure on GOP moderates and Democrats to demand they put Americans first and tackle the real issues.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ziimp8l1al6lbofileo97hji67j22hj9o3j7oego_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpie6o31c9h2bs)**

Thank you for your support,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?"
| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9j7lgc0gisjjsa8dd9ohvjen3gsq34l5j6eeac0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpie9or0cth2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zks1c19f4o5hid09qa38s811j8br59ck1v4n1rmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpie9or0cth2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7891%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=HEylsDXzC56bJtVW7H%2fdjw&sysid=1)
# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93513%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KfY%2b6dvKDdcxhNTdGHvqdA&sysid=1). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93514%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=K2E2LFscoBfliF%2bdPWi5qQ&sysid=1) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93525%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZLRN02jE0YTEXZUXNMfq9A&sysid=1) Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93526%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=d00QU%2fyfjihzpUIeOc4jVQ&sysid=1) You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93527%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zhFqcA5bHAXF3og7EDgeug&sysid=1) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93528%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=G4qEToOzC%2fu%2frfW1sftpHQ&sysid=1). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93525%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZLRN02jE0YTEXZUXNMfq9A&sysid=1) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters **More Raving Reviews From Customers!** | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."
---|---

Real reviews from real customers. Sometimes customers receive a free product to test or as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. For more information see [Terms & Conditions](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93529%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UL%2bh5x0E60W7QTZL%2fsoA1g&sysid=1).

Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... FREE Bonus #9: You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order! It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. Look, this food tastes homemade. It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just . When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. As it stands today, it's every man for himself. In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters More Raving Reviews From Customers! | | Rory H. I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things. ---|--- | Billy H. Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup. ---|--- | Kevin S. The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start. ---|--- | Carol B. I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings. ---|--- | Ken K. I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal. ---|--- | Justin A. My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great. ---|--- | Gary M. I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed. ---|--- | John H. We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when." ---|--- Real reviews from real customers. body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57637370/388621314/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230122_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDgyM2M3ZDEtNjk5YS1lZDExLTk5NGMtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6jsBSFDutaSRPlAu5TShhcjCM35qRU2TLrq2Ey6ucj4=)
---
50 years ago today, in a 7-2 decision, the Supreme Court guaranteed a woman’s right to an abortion in the landmark case _Roe v. Wade. _ And then, last June, an ultra-conservative Court struck it down. Tens of millions of women were immediately stripped of their reproductive freedoms, as trigger bans and decades-old anti-choice laws started going into effect. And it seems every week we hear of a new restriction working its way through a statehouse, looming over the millions of women it threatens to oppress. _And forced birth extremists still aren’t satisfied._ On Friday, the March for Life marched right past the U.S. Capitol as a signal to Republicans that they are pushing for a **federal ban on abortion.** And several Republicans, including House Speaker Kevin McCarthy, have expressed support. Everything is at risk — and the time to jump into this fight is **right now.** It’s critical that we fight this fight everywhere: In the courts, in the statehouses, and yes, in Congress. We need more women in every room where decisions about our bodies are being made. We NEED more women in Congress standing up for our right to choose. [_**Today, on the 50th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ , please consider making a donation on behalf of the tens of millions of women who need someone fighting for them. Your support can’t come soon enough:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57637371/388621316/-1914796982?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230122_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDgyM2M3ZDEtNjk5YS1lZDExLTk5NGMtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6jsBSFDutaSRPlAu5TShhcjCM35qRU2TLrq2Ey6ucj4=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57637372/388621317/-1914796982?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230122_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDgyM2M3ZDEtNjk5YS1lZDExLTk5NGMtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6jsBSFDutaSRPlAu5TShhcjCM35qRU2TLrq2Ey6ucj4=)

name: Shift WA
subject: Top news: Democrats' terrible bills
body:
Newly elected Republican State Senator Nikki Torres (15th LD) joined us to discuss her priorities for the 2023 legislative session, including improving public safety by reversing many of the Democrats' disastrous anti-police measures. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61411341:WLDBGoDcN:m:1:2610672541:81229DE3670CF58DDE0CD8CB8E7B90C7:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends,

Welcome to 2023 and the new legislative session, and as always, we here at Shift WA have you covered with some of this week's most read stories and insights into what is going on in your own political backyard! Read on...

**This week 's Newsmaker Interview...**
Newly elected Republican State Senator Nikki Torres (15th LD) joined us to discuss her priorities for the 2023 legislative session, including improving public safety by reversing many of the Democrats' disastrous anti-police measures. Torres also discussed her belief that the legislature should focus on helping families through tax relief rather than expanding state government. She also provided insights on her legislation designed to help our farmers by improving their access to water. [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61411342:WLDBGoDcN:m:1:2610672541:81229DE3670CF58DDE0CD8CB8E7B90C7:r)**.
**
**This week 's top story...**
The 2023 legislative session has started - and that means Democrats have begun introducing a series of terrible bills. Democrat Senator Rebecca Saldana has introduced bills that would have taxpayers paying for lawyers for convicted criminals to appeal their convictions and taxpayer-funded unemployment benefits for people illegally in this country. And that's just two of the ridiculous bills introduced so far. [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61411343:WLDBGoDcN:m:1:2610672541:81229DE3670CF58DDE0CD8CB8E7B90C7:r)**.
**
**In case you missed it ... **
The Seattle Times has run 30 stories about Republican Congressman George Santos (NY) and his admission that he repeatedly lied to voters about his background. By contrast, our state's biggest newspaper has not posted one single story about the numerous lies of Democrat State Representative Clyde Shavers since the paper posted one minor piece back in November. Notably, Shift broke that story six days before the Times bothered to report on it while voters were returning their ballots. Bias much, Seattle Times? [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61411344:WLDBGoDcN:m:1:2610672541:81229DE3670CF58DDE0CD8CB8E7B90C7:r)**.**

P.S. Have you signed up for our Daily Briefing? If not, please take a moment to sign up now by clicking [**here**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61411345:WLDBGoDcN:m:1:2610672541:81229DE3670CF58DDE0CD8CB8E7B90C7:r)**.**

AND with Twitter under new ownership, and if that's a news source for you, we hope you will take a moment to follow us today by [**clicking here**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61411346:WLDBGoDcN:m:1:2610672541:81229DE3670CF58DDE0CD8CB8E7B90C7:r)! | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61411347:WLDBGoDcN:m:1:2610672541:81229DE3670CF58DDE0CD8CB8E7B90C7:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14118832&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oWLDBGoDcN).
---

Have you signed up for our Daily Briefing? If not, please take a moment to sign up now by clicking . AND with Twitter under new ownership, and if that's a news source for you, we hope you will take a moment to follow us today by ! | | This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can to do so. You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on & . name: American Update
subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0409%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=59D6KRaleBgIFRmW6%2bgIhQ&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656419%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gdZY%2bIIgBLZH0FAiWvsndA&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656410%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=k9gZvYw4HpHLRhXeMVk%2fUQ&sysid=1)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656410%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=k9gZvYw4HpHLRhXeMVk%2fUQ&sysid=1)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0409%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=59D6KRaleBgIFRmW6%2bgIhQ&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0409%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=59D6KRaleBgIFRmW6%2bgIhQ&sysid=1)

subject: NEW 8-Pound Solar Generator is HERE!
body:
# "Weird" 8-Pound Solar Device
Could Save Your Life in a
Dangerous Blackout
**Our #1 Most Requested Item Finally
Back In Stock, Inventory Limited!** Hello I'm Cade Courtley, former Navy SEAL, Platoon Commander, sniper and author of the _SEAL Survival Guide._ The last two years has taught us that it's not IF you need a backup plan... **it's WHEN.** A deadly pandemic, dangerous blackouts sweeping the nation, storms, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest and crumbling power grids. It's sad, but facts are facts. Crisis mode has become the new normal. And you see the need to protect yourself and your family. So let me be clear: **One of the best ways to protect your safety and comfort is to guarantee you're always fully ready, even when the power goes out.** Nothing feels more vulnerable than that split second when you realize you're sitting in a dangerous blackout. All your critical devices are now on borrowed time. All your critical communications, comfort and protection, suddenly called into question. That's what happened after Hurricane Ida when thousands of families faced being without power... for WEEKS. **You simply must have a backup power plan, no matter your situation or budget.** Well now you can... Because for the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get a breakthrough NEW solar device... That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's **_safe to use inside_** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run. But if you want one, you better hurry... Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market. And now that these next batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long. You're among the first to know about...
# The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick
Finally... a Mini Solar Generator
that Never Needs Gas and that
Costs Less than an iPhone!
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bf0dcfddf1ee44f4854227f146ca3cee&_e=6zjxqLBbUgYUwK758EdFzSz41gcY8BnEAfGGToEqXbPWkpx6_cC2dI-vfIxPKFhH0Pd8ZFoKhdjAwsLPhzf27hWj8iNiwQgkQCJbKMBioQNty2PFnuYAAXl0Aq9PHJiF87zrZm1pg_pzY2OvrD5E3ngD9KZR2d9TQtb9N1a8m4UcOT5Div2P2wMFWT20hLHJZUHCpYgRQO0iMdYu8FOI5sb4zs73Svh3SjBiqzfhVnMgG9I_3rU8meCPzI3uujY7h9azFZsVZD2M7vIIre7y7pSo9xObxnAei-CXwMYc6T4%3D) [**YES! There's an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bf0dcfddf1ee44f4854227f146ca3cee&_e=6zjxqLBbUgYUwK758EdFzSz41gcY8BnEAfGGToEqXbPWkpx6_cC2dI-vfIxPKFhH0Pd8ZFoKhdjAwsLPhzf27hWj8iNiwQgkQCJbKMBioQNty2PFnuYAAXl0Aq9PHJiF87zrZm1pg_pzY2OvrD5E3pdvKAFdfAxWUpU_QoBwmbupqt6K5bJgfWyLvIXAjrY39MahPsTJg5sjWxv7BbFg1IE_wCKpSTNFBs3afu89aMghmYuPgzd6J0b5MhXooJgH_SPBPuLOoP6tnyGCkIgwWbYM7joswVwOzQ8FdG9TFMw%3D) Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more! You'll be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... **And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes. [**You also get $243.90 of FREE Gifts today!**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bf0dcfddf1ee44f4854227f146ca3cee&_e=6zjxqLBbUgYUwK758EdFzSz41gcY8BnEAfGGToEqXbPWkpx6_cC2dI-vfIxPKFhH0Pd8ZFoKhdjAwsLPhzf27hWj8iNiwQgkQCJbKMBioQNty2PFnuYAAXl0Aq9PHJiF87zrZm1pg_pzY2OvrD5E3jK9X70Rj1Ywi90ZhkRyHSreC0GLDprgGZNx_qUrzxV2KEJzM1yD6VQe20e92EhSBn_72oJG2gkAXQR08fEGS_TgMf289bQg1wuu5dZZGRKejO5eTUtpidGmgh-2rUYaOZWd0_gPxy0MIkTWHM5njC4%3D)
* Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included
* and more!

That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**The Patriot Power Sidekick
Is An Essential Part of
Your Preparedness Plan!**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bf0dcfddf1ee44f4854227f146ca3cee&_e=6zjxqLBbUgYUwK758EdFzSz41gcY8BnEAfGGToEqXbPWkpx6_cC2dI-vfIxPKFhH0Pd8ZFoKhdjAwsLPhzf27hWj8iNiwQgkQCJbKMBioQNty2PFnuYAAXl0Aq9PHJiF87zrZm1pg_pzY2OvrD5E3uIAX1FZEqhuefAlQIoMgMheJQgPYgDfB41Yh8joZKf--kBHGQsSl7ADl0mb1qESefBgBpqcQ2iCL6036hetznHZqvuruXk9KHO33YjwoXrCdyORZpy9xCs8evHl8Czwv3XvbUeB9JPPzq6MlOizYKA%3D) [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bf0dcfddf1ee44f4854227f146ca3cee&_e=6zjxqLBbUgYUwK758EdFzSz41gcY8BnEAfGGToEqXbPWkpx6_cC2dI-vfIxPKFhH0Pd8ZFoKhdjAwsLPhzf27hWj8iNiwQgkQCJbKMBioQNty2PFnuYAAXl0Aq9PHJiF87zrZm1pg_pzY2OvrD5E3tDvx5tFtR529d0onoQu9jGjWOMENIYemlXT8TMD7oBxikJ569s3ln7JXjVU9TSb8x7pygq5pdno8hhflIAiVF38-RJMOzaTCwdMDc6pZq-0AKE1hn5-fwyh6jWsUKQe8ANfoGKtf7AR6NvkuvzZFZc%3D) _"I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere - very light!"_ _Craig W.
Police Officer
_ [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bf0dcfddf1ee44f4854227f146ca3cee&_e=6zjxqLBbUgYUwK758EdFzSz41gcY8BnEAfGGToEqXbPWkpx6_cC2dI-vfIxPKFhH0Pd8ZFoKhdjAwsLPhzf27hWj8iNiwQgkQCJbKMBioQNty2PFnuYAAXl0Aq9PHJiF87zrZm1pg_pzY2OvrD5E3kVl7_xgzY3S-C2Aury3KL7oep9x6MFVH60eDXwF5c9DHaMW668Oh_ZbcpjRxUivKRmvymGnBs3WNausJNIC9szP6PttnI4eSjWAM-ow1CYMdXyM8ZYwnD5Nf3FVg8nf52QzAJd-xZjuALSbNDvEvUo%3D) | | **Rita L.** This product is so versatile, and at only 8 lbs, my grandchildren can get it. We had many trees down from a storm. The guys kept having to refill their gas powered chainsaws. My husband came out with this "little" box and his electric chainsaw. They laughed and said a long electric cord would be too dangerous. My husband calmly hooked up his Sidekick and made short work at lopping off the branches and then walked through the path he made. It lasted longer than the gas 'polluting' machines. Very grateful you have made this available to buy at an affordable price.
---|---
| **Steve G.** Peace of mind for years. I purchased this product to provide power to run a box fan in the summer and lights in the winter. I can use this product every day for over four years as it can be recharged up to 2,000 times. It won't make noise that draws attention and can create comfort in a difficult situation. Best of all, it's portable.
---|---
| **Thomas B.** Saved my CPAP machine during the winter storms. I just survived the ice storm, the freeze and the power outage in Texas using my 4Patriots products. I was most happy about my Patriot Power Sidekick. It's quiet. It's clean. I was able to deploy the solar panels on the dashboard of my van, it charged up. And then that night I plugged in my CPAP machine and it ran it all night long. With enough to charge my phone in the morning.
---|---
| **Jana H.** Portable power was a blessing when the grid failed us. I didn't think I'd need this but I needed it shortly after receiving it. This past February was the worst freeze that we, in Texas, have seen in a long time. Our power grid failed big time. We were without power for a couple of days. This product was a blessing. We were able to have a light and a small portable TV. I highly recommend this product and the company that sells it.
---|---
| **Allan D.** Patriot Power Sidekick to the rescue. We brought our new Patriot Power Sidekick with us on our last camping trip and it was a blessing. Our primary use was to power an air pump to easily fill up our air mattress for a comfortable night's sleep. One night we had a pinhole leak in the air mattress, so we just kept the Sidekick inside the tent hooked up to the air pump and ran it for a few minutes about every 3 hours to keep it fully inflated. It's quiet and powerful, and we will have it with us on every camping trip!
---|---
| **Chris S.** Power out, no problem. Recently had a power outage due to some crazy storms. I use my phone for everything. Having the sidekick charged up and charging my nearly dead phone meant I was able to have my alarm and get to work on time. Thank you for this compact, lightweight and fume free portable charging/light station available for when I needed it the most!
---|---
| **Richard B.** Well worth it! This is one of the items that made me a loyal customer. I never was a big fan on solar-powered anything. At the same time I've been in enough situations to know any type of a generator is necessary when you live in a more rural setting. Especially when gas prices go through the roof. I purchased the Sidekick and as soon as it arrived I unpacked it and plugged it into a lamp and left it plugged in all evening. I was impressed how little it took from the battery! After 3 hours the Sidekick was still at 98% fully charged. I'm looking forward to having two Sidekicks!
---|---
| **Frank S.** We have been looking for quite a while for something like this. The deal with the solar panels included was something not to pass up! We both have sleep apnea and use c/bipap machines for sleep. The power went out recently and the sidekick worked great. As a test we ran the Sidekick on the humidifier and it ran about 7 hours! It's a small humidifier. That's not bad for that type of application. Cannot wait till camping season comes along! We highly recommend this product.
---|---
[**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bf0dcfddf1ee44f4854227f146ca3cee&_e=6zjxqLBbUgYUwK758EdFzSz41gcY8BnEAfGGToEqXbPWkpx6_cC2dI-vfIxPKFhH0Pd8ZFoKhdjAwsLPhzf27hWj8iNiwQgkQCJbKMBioQNty2PFnuYAAXl0Aq9PHJiF87zrZm1pg_pzY2OvrD5E3gnGXOSXLuDNokFKc8PIX5toilwFrEcvzmDmAdQmbgv24c_qHorD1NAw73j3HaD3Ig-AAh3S-TqJ_2177fNt9VyoM8HwUoDvTDx7n86ZS6sb66ekFLl1N69PBFmNL4jaD2IQBac-2P_twRbqHqVi0o4%3D)

Sent to Full Mag News subscribers.

I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere - very light!" Craig W. Police Officer | | Rita L. This product is so versatile, and at only 8 lbs, my grandchildren can get it. We had many trees down from a storm. The guys kept having to refill their gas powered chainsaws. My husband came out with this "little" box and his electric chainsaw. They laughed and said a long electric cord would be too dangerous. My husband calmly hooked up his Sidekick and made short work at lopping off the branches and then walked through the path he made. It lasted longer than the gas 'polluting' machines. Very grateful you have made this available to buy at an affordable price. ---|--- | Steve G. Peace of mind for years. I purchased this product to provide power to run a box fan in the summer and lights in the winter. I can use this product every day for over four years as it can be recharged up to 2,000 times. It won't make noise that draws attention and can create comfort in a difficult situation. Best of all, it's portable. ---|--- | Thomas B. Saved my CPAP machine during the winter storms. I just survived the ice storm, the freeze and the power outage in Texas using my 4Patriots products. I was most happy about my Patriot Power Sidekick. It's quiet. It's clean. I was able to deploy the solar panels on the dashboard of my van, it charged up. And then that night I plugged in my CPAP machine and it ran it all night long. With enough to charge my phone in the morning. ---|--- | Jana H. Portable power was a blessing when the grid failed us. I didn't think I'd need this but I needed it shortly after receiving it. This past February was the worst freeze that we, in Texas, have seen in a long time. Our power grid failed big time. We were without power for a couple of days. This product was a blessing. We were able to have a light and a small portable TV. I highly recommend this product and the company that sells it. ---|--- | Allan D. Patriot Power Sidekick to the rescue. We brought our new Patriot Power Sidekick with us on our last camping trip and it was a blessing. Our primary use was to power an air pump to easily fill up our air mattress for a comfortable night's sleep. One night we had a pinhole leak in the air mattress, so we just kept the Sidekick inside the tent hooked up to the air pump and ran it for a few minutes about every 3 hours to keep it fully inflated. It's quiet and powerful, and we will have it with us on every camping trip! ---|--- | Chris S. Power out, no problem. Recently had a power outage due to some crazy storms. I use my phone for everything. Having the sidekick charged up and charging my nearly dead phone meant I was able to have my alarm and get to work on time. Thank you for this compact, lightweight and fume free portable charging/light station available for when I needed it the most! ---|--- | Richard B. Well worth it! This is one of the items that made me a loyal customer. I never was a big fan on solar-powered anything. At the same time I've been in enough situations to know any type of a generator is necessary when you live in a more rural setting. Especially when gas prices go through the roof. I purchased the Sidekick and as soon as it arrived I unpacked it and plugged it into a lamp and left it plugged in all evening. I was impressed how little it took from the battery! After 3 hours the Sidekick was still at 98% fully charged. I'm looking forward to having two Sidekicks! ---|--- | Frank S.** We have been looking for quite a while for something like this. The deal with the solar panels included was something not to pass up! We both have sleep apnea and use c/bipap machines for sleep. The power went out recently and the sidekick worked great. As a test we ran the Sidekick on the humidifier and it ran about 7 hours! It's a small humidifier. That's not bad for that type of application. Cannot wait till camping season comes along! We highly recommend this product. ---|--- Sent to Full Mag News subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Watch the new free course now
body:
Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?”

| | | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3c4b859d982a40b5b18a30d1774cf022&_e=nnFf6p_gHo8sy_zpgGnvG9x8Yqb57lxjuEyU00f4U6aVyqzLt_3Ts4iIdr8SmI13RSB69_oiPcKOWqV03JbRfK4dw75kxIKH20Uzcr8x6XvZtgQ8kE727-K6cHS8F291BOb16TeIabvMEJrv55gFtXZgY5VwbLyFiKHd4BRcxX2NdsV35KJiJD1CE951XMMo9q0T5KQLI1XHMavLNK3BDZl1E78MNh13uqgTDlUqQOH7oyxK2NQ-xgXJwhqEwTZ6dF4NRWoFnQj48oF8fdC7T0NJBnC1z27_k_AxUkkeqGjbq8oooCvwc51urzInoCISfypjtWgZ4Ji_kABcPMthDrBp_aUF0SHKGL3IlQToaEzJpvCpHftV_4EqFW1rGSr5QJTP6Ac_kSO9EsTXWl3kFA%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, **" The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism."**
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3c4b859d982a40b5b18a30d1774cf022&_e=nnFf6p_gHo8sy_zpgGnvG9x8Yqb57lxjuEyU00f4U6aVyqzLt_3Ts4iIdr8SmI13RSB69_oiPcKOWqV03JbRfK4dw75kxIKH20Uzcr8x6XvZtgQ8kE727-K6cHS8F291BOb16TeIabvMEJrv55gFtXZgY5VwbLyFiKHd4BRcxX2NdsV35KJiJD1CE951XMMo9q0T5KQLI1XHMavLNK3BDZl1E78MNh13uqgTDlUqQOH7oyxK2NQ-xgXJwhqEwTZ6A1EzDnnyCz4YNO_AiqBLxeMEo2mcuWHdgovDfq-n0_0_mUHfzusS8q7QNYyV2o_M6qZ-EQh3t1_vsp0D7EJJKmFzA2X7zgyaiVdx3rOjTZC5gp1DfTdM9vPxx-1_qd8PzcQcnsIyvSCDG2H_WfMMZA%3D%3D)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3c4b859d982a40b5b18a30d1774cf022&_e=nnFf6p_gHo8sy_zpgGnvG9x8Yqb57lxjuEyU00f4U6aVyqzLt_3Ts4iIdr8SmI13RSB69_oiPcKOWqV03JbRfK4dw75kxIKH20Uzcr8x6XvZtgQ8kE727-K6cHS8F291BOb16TeIabvMEJrv55gFtXZgY5VwbLyFiKHd4BRcxX2NdsV35KJiJD1CE951XMMo9q0T5KQLI1XHMavLNK3BDZl1E78MNh13uqgTDlUqQOH7oyxK2NQ-xgXJwhqEwTZ6Bq_RGCnD6VuwMMKpumvCDN8cQjgt92bIRPWNA3iU3404V72DuvapCEsBG4obZr08khsL7z0Lb-e9IW7ijdvvhOI7JX83iu_lvE8kbN2zyB0oZqHO_kVV9FwO3L0UfGJaBJ8GRqa0nHUAI-gh2H-mvw%3D%3D)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Sent to Defend the Constitution subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: Take the National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” | | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=175d77c4d99c4659bf7a764be200b689&_e=arg7QJr6cP11FhwRnSWiSwabHNvhOqGWYJFkbQEbLesYo_5JZ7c_yEXN19R3z9BE3X-4KV1avsB1giQyR3iocyuis31huodWUAxsRqPJN-MPMHNORufwzQzRgD-zpVrk2l3961DR1mIsnIuEyK3Mt5f_3OEmGfx2FR4zC4QjN3vw_lm1FWBJo0O9hcCmsZh5mKGUGdU1xld6LsRA_vatKvYt2LNgnqfUJ_4dVitQUgr6LcHEnecl1O6zTwInKZ3HpAXZHQA0_zKHGejZJFaJsjJsNkDDfb2wRtHpBMSK_a8uTwZ-9v1fWSr9Hx_7XnEu87bvXz60GT8eOYzRKMfEq-vnxs2IL_GvrCU6vZz35f7iLYEUeFq2vHxJ0K5398miK8LYRgdKYLFK9KzyY_MIwS0dZkOow2vwLotOe5CaYJM%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=175d77c4d99c4659bf7a764be200b689&_e=arg7QJr6cP11FhwRnSWiSwabHNvhOqGWYJFkbQEbLesYo_5JZ7c_yEXN19R3z9BE3X-4KV1avsB1giQyR3iocyuis31huodWUAxsRqPJN-MPMHNORufwzQzRgD-zpVrk2l3961DR1mIsnIuEyK3Mt5f_3OEmGfx2FR4zC4QjN3vw_lm1FWBJo0O9hcCmsZh5mKGUGdU1xld6LsRA_vatKvYt2LNgnqfUJ_4dVitQUgr6LcHEnecl1O6zTwInKZ3HSLa1yAzhhkng1a5jJlVvenAL0v8_ESo4TTkhH5J4UEbDiNG8W0WzPw9cmUCrpzLmOp2MAMzwWL058IQdRr-1qBSF4eJpJuDp-r-bgV81D9K9fDML-sNwG9lZRSLVpPbU8q9t8waxzT4VvzoprIbaCXBbTssMdcHO05Kci7RZ2vk%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=175d77c4d99c4659bf7a764be200b689&_e=arg7QJr6cP11FhwRnSWiSwabHNvhOqGWYJFkbQEbLesYo_5JZ7c_yEXN19R3z9BE3X-4KV1avsB1giQyR3iocyuis31huodWUAxsRqPJN-MPMHNORufwzQzRgD-zpVrk2l3961DR1mIsnIuEyK3Mt5f_3OEmGfx2FR4zC4QjN3vw_lm1FWBJo0O9hcCmsZh5mKGUGdU1xld6LsRA_vatKvYt2LNgnqfUJ_4dVitQUgr6LcHEnecl1O6zTwInKZ3HufYhj2lhI8eKESbDJwRb9iKAXEjNRqufwTppPslmyrBrzD0hfGpjasrAbOGtoXDT7ifsy1JljRbbk5XjTxZe3qOILKs9gwOnUfz5bkJMCLSWBD0fBpoFC9M7EEsBgBTob6sSPUBkv-QWScq_-P1L0ddUNycxby-DZ6XGlRDtofk%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

> \---------- Forwarded message ---------
> From: O.M.
> Date: October 5, 2022
> Subject: This is not an isolated moment
> History has shown us that fighting for the promise of a free and fair democracy does not happen in a singular moment. The civil rights movement has marched forward and advocated for change time and time again, generation after generation.. Our moment for action has come. We are at the front line advocating for this very promise. **Yesterday, the moment for Black voters in Alabama was no different.**
> On Tuesday, October 4, 2022, the U.S. Supreme Court heard oral argument in _Merrill v. Milligan_. This case is an ongoing challenge to Alabama's new congressional district map, which a lower court found likely violated Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act (VRA) and diluted Black voting power. The district court directed the state to draw a new congressional map that would provide Black voters with two -- districts that would allow them the opportunity to elect candidates of their choice.
> Alabama immediately appealed the trial court's decision to the U.S. Supreme Court. In a 5-4 decision, the Court blocked the remedial map-drawing process ordered by the lower court. As a result, Alabama voters will have to vote under the state’s discriminatory congressional map in the 2022 election—a map that is unfair and not representative of Alabamians.
> **[All On The Line has worked tirelessly for the past years to encourage states to make their redistricting process fair and transparent. Will you contribute to supporting our work to fight for the inclusion of communities that have been excluded in the past and need a voice in states like Alabama?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57638782/388626251/-1673140014?refcode=20230122_AOTL_F_ALupdatekicker_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI2OTRhMWVhLTZkOWEtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ncOjLwfxxyY7hlySYKUCKbBLkSYhGvFg8LkwcMBO21s=)**

clean_body: | Team -- Olivia made it clear that this is not an isolated moment. We can’t lose sight of the purpose of the fight for fair maps, because the opposition to fair democracy is the continuation of manipulating the maps. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = \-- All On The Line \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: O.M. Date: October 5, 2022 Subject: This is not an isolated moment History has shown us that fighting for the promise of a free and fair democracy does not happen in a singular moment. The civil rights movement has marched forward and advocated for change time and time again, generation after generation.. Our moment for action has come. We are at the front line advocating for this very promise. Yesterday, the moment for Black voters in Alabama was no different. On Tuesday, October 4, 2022, the U.S. Supreme Court heard oral argument in Merrill v. Milligan. This case is an ongoing challenge to Alabama's new congressional district map, which a lower court found likely violated Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act (VRA) and diluted Black voting power. The district court directed the state to draw a new congressional map that would provide Black voters with two -- districts that would allow them the opportunity to elect candidates of their choice. Alabama immediately appealed the trial court's decision to the U.S. Supreme Court. In a 5-4 decision, the Court blocked the remedial map-drawing process ordered by the lower court. As a result, Alabama voters will have to vote under the state’s discriminatory congressional map in the 2022 election—a map that is unfair and not representative of Alabamians. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: --- = | = = | = = | = If the Supreme Court overturns the lower court’s decision, the consequences will be immediate and severe. This could effectively remove significant protections against racial vote dilution and will set back the VRA's voting protections for communities of color across the country. The National Redistricting Foundation, a 501(c)(3) affiliate of All On The Line, is supporting the Merrill v. Milligan case to fight for the ability of Black Alabamians to elect representatives of their choice and have their voices heard. The right to vote and elect your representative is a founding ideal of this nation. When we allow our ideals to be diluted, we are no longer representative of our strengths but giving into our greatest weaknesses, as a nation. This was not just a run-of-the-mill hearing on October 4. This was a moment to recommit to the fight for a free and fair democracy. When we see this egregious behavior, like Alabama in Merrill v. Milligan , we recommit ourselves to the long battle for freedom and fairness. This is democracy. We can't lose sight of this moment and how it impacts the promise of our nation’s fight toward a fair and just democracy. = Olivia Mendoza, Deputy Director Litigation and Policy All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Five ways we can stand up to the overturning of Roe v. Wade right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
Because abortion rights are a kitchen table issue.
---
| Friends,

Today - what would have been the 50th anniversary of the landmark 1973 Supreme Court ruling protecting reproductive freedom - is a tough day. Knowing that we came within months of celebrating this milestone only to be sent back in time by a radical extreme Republican Party is painful. In this post-Roe America, we can feel the waves of uncertainty, shame, and fear roll across us.

**But I don’t want to spend today sitting in fear. I want to channel my anger into action, and I want you to join me. So right now, let’s talk about five things we can do to stand up to the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ :**
1. VOTE (and do everything in your power to help others do the same). I know it’s not always enough - here we are in this reality, after all - but if Donald Trump hadn’t been able to pack the Supreme Court with extremists, _Roe v. Wade_ would still be the law of the land today. Elections have consequences.

2. Support state and local candidates and elected officials in states that are working to criminalize abortion. Those frontline fights are where we can prevent bad policies from being enacted in the first place.

3. Donate directly to abortion funds - visit the [**National Network of Abortion Funds**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57639074/388627330/1528360079?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjFlNWFhMC02ZTlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kC004iq2JYUJtUiGa2lA-YJOY0OasqCJNF3rSmqhOF4=&emci=876d398f-be99-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=f21e5aa0-6e9a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=14239920) to find your local fund.

4. Offer your help, whether that’s time or donations or both, to organizations that have been on the ground fighting for abortion rights for years. These folks have spent a long time thinking about how to support their communities and building up infrastructure, so your help can make a big impact.

5. Call your representatives (state and federal!) and make sure they’re supporting all the ways we can protect people from dangerous abortion bans.

It’s easy to feel downhearted and frankly, even slip into hopelessness when we think about the fact that attacking reproductive freedom is at the very top of the GOP agenda. Despite overwhelming support for abortion access from a majority of Americans, extremists are determined to control our bodies.

_**But this is not our grandparents’ fight.**_

We have more resources dedicated to this work than ever before.

We have developments, like the abortion pill, that has expanded availability, thanks to a recent update from the FDA.

We have powerful local and national organizations teeming with passionate activists.

And critically, we have the ability to connect with one another in ways we’ve just never had before - today’s technologies, from social media to online organizing and fundraising, are a huge asset in this effort.

**No matter what, we will continue the fight for abortion rights. And we will win.**

[**If you’re with me - feeling determined rather than defeated - let’s take this moment and use it as an opportunity to reaffirm our commitment to the fight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57639076/388627332/-335862402?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjFlNWFhMC02ZTlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kC004iq2JYUJtUiGa2lA-YJOY0OasqCJNF3rSmqhOF4=&emci=876d398f-be99-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=f21e5aa0-6e9a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=14239920)

**Today, we have a chance to band together and say out loud that abortion rights are an economic issue, they are a life-or-death issue, they are an issue that can win elections, and we will not stop talking about them until we secure the right to bodily autonomy for every single person in this country.**

[**If you’re in, sign your name right now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57639078/388627334/-335862402?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjFlNWFhMC02ZTlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kC004iq2JYUJtUiGa2lA-YJOY0OasqCJNF3rSmqhOF4=&emci=876d398f-be99-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=f21e5aa0-6e9a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=14239920)

I hope I’ll see your signature on this list - because the only way we can make this happen is by working together.

Thank you.

Sara

Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District
---

I want to channel my anger into action, and I want you to join me. So right now, let’s talk about five things we can do to stand up to the overturning of Roe v. Wade : 1. VOTE (and do everything in your power to help others do the same). I know it’s not always enough - here we are in this reality, after all - but if Donald Trump hadn’t been able to pack the Supreme Court with extremists, Roe v. Wade would still be the law of the land today. Elections have consequences. 2. Support state and local candidates and elected officials in states that are working to criminalize abortion. Those frontline fights are where we can prevent bad policies from being enacted in the first place. 3. Donate directly to abortion funds - visit the to find your local fund. 4. Offer your help, whether that’s time or donations or both, to organizations that have been on the ground fighting for abortion rights for years. These folks have spent a long time thinking about how to support their communities and building up infrastructure, so your help can make a big impact. 5. Call your representatives (state and federal!) and make sure they’re supporting all the ways we can protect people from dangerous abortion bans. It’s easy to feel downhearted and frankly, even slip into hopelessness when we think about the fact that attacking reproductive freedom is at the very top of the GOP agenda. Despite overwhelming support for abortion access from a majority of Americans, extremists are determined to control our bodies. But this is not our grandparents’ fight. We have more resources dedicated to this work than ever before. We have developments, like the abortion pill, that has expanded availability, thanks to a recent update from the FDA. We have powerful local and national organizations teeming with passionate activists. And critically, we have the ability to connect with one another in ways we’ve just never had before - today’s technologies, from social media to online organizing and fundraising, are a huge asset in this effort. No matter what, we will continue the fight for abortion rights. And we will win. Today, we have a chance to band together and say out loud that abortion rights are an economic issue, they are a life-or-death issue, they are an issue that can win elections, and we will not stop talking about them until we secure the right to bodily autonomy for every single person in this country. I hope I’ll see your signature on this list - because the only way we can make this happen is by working together. Thank you. Sara Congresswoman Sara Jacobs California’s 51st District * | | = Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States | | | ---|---|--- = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

name: Lt. Gov. Austin Davis
subject: humbling
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
I am writing to you now as the first Black Lieutenant Governor in the history of the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania.

Derek, I am writing to you now as the first Black Lieutenant Governor in the history of the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania. As I took the Oath of Office five days ago, I thought of my parents. As the son of a union bus driver and a hairdresser, I’ve seen firsthand the kinds of sacrifices parents all across this Commonwealth make every day for their children. And I thought of my grandparents, who came to Pennsylvania from the South to create a better life for our family. I don’t think that this — their grandson taking the Oath to serve in the second highest position in the Commonwealth — is something they ever imagined. I am humbled, Derek, not just by what this moment represents and the message it sends, but by the opportunities it creates. The opportunity, alongside Governor Shapiro, to ensure every child and family in this Commonwealth gets the chance to build a great life. The opportunity to create an economy that works for everyone. The opportunity to make life easier for working-class folks struggling to make ends meet. The opportunity to make sure our kids have good schools. The opportunity to fight for your fundamental freedoms — like the freedom to choose, the freedom to proudly and openly love who you love, and the freedom to have your voice count in our democracy. I want you to know what an honor it is to fight for your family and serve this incredible Commonwealth. And I could not be more excited for all that is to come, for everything that we — Governor Shapiro and I and all of us — will work together to accomplish for the people of Pennsylvania. Thank you for everything you did to get us here, Derek. More to come. Sincerely, Austin Davis
_Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania_

Do you support access to legal and safe reproductive healthcare?
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57641337/388634936/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzIxOTU0ZS03NjlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fM_IW_z1UYJNHnF21zXY8jHjygaGfE68xdXbT41Xm_k=) | Team —

Today marks the 50th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ , the landmark decision to protect a woman’s right to an abortion. But just last year, the Supreme Court undid decades of precedent by overturning this landmark decision.

Now the Republican Party has decided that overturning _Roe_ wasn't enough. They're continuing to work overtime to strip millions of Americans of their rights.

Ohio has some of the most restrictive abortion laws in the country — and DeWine’s six-week abortion ban would make safe abortion access even more difficult. **Ohio Democrats will continue fighting to elect pro-choice leaders up and down the ballot, but we need your support.**

[**Will you join us in calling for the restoration of _Roe v. Wade's_ protections in Ohio and nationwide? Add your name to our petition if you’re committed to electing Ohio Democrats who will restore reproductive rights >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57641341/388634938/819789526?ms=em23_230122_roe50_adv_gq_act___TODP_ettx&refcode=em23_230122_roe50_adv_gq_act___TODP_ettx&source=em23_230122_roe50_adv_gq_act___TODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230122_roe50_adv_gq_act___TODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=53sBA4cCR3tL8leLRGND4V%2FHIpK6J%2BHQqbNywHxQFbffxNFdhV%2FFz3FQD5Ip5QTc1dhmlP%2BguUU0q2v3s2N6BUQJ7jW0fasCAWvOdh9zwO2TqSohleNhPyHTHIXPRMpLyMzY%2Baxs1DEN2TCGqRnZaw%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzIxOTU0ZS03NjlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fM_IW_z1UYJNHnF21zXY8jHjygaGfE68xdXbT41Xm_k=&emci=83e87298-ea98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=bc21954e-769a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=25291327) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57641345/388634942/819789526?ms=em23_230122_roe50_adv_gq_act___TODP_ettx&refcode=em23_230122_roe50_adv_gq_act___TODP_ettx&source=em23_230122_roe50_adv_gq_act___TODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230122_roe50_adv_gq_act___TODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=53sBA4cCR3tL8leLRGND4V%2FHIpK6J%2BHQqbNywHxQFbffxNFdhV%2FFz3FQD5Ip5QTc1dhmlP%2BguUU0q2v3s2N6BUQJ7jW0fasCAWvOdh9zwO2TqSohleNhPyHTHIXPRMpLyMzY%2Baxs1DEN2TCGqRnZaw%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzIxOTU0ZS03NjlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fM_IW_z1UYJNHnF21zXY8jHjygaGfE68xdXbT41Xm_k=&emci=83e87298-ea98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=bc21954e-769a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=25291327) Ohio Democrats and the majority of Ohioans believe a woman has the right to reproductive freedom – including the right to safe and legal abortion.
