name: Roy Cooper
subject: 50 years ago today, the Supreme Court decided Roe v. Wade.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Now, Roe is gone. But we’re not giving up the fight.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57641352/388634947/823540626?refcode=ea.c521954e-769a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.c521954e-769a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTIxOTU0ZS03NjlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cN_Xzr-8D8CIHDq1tDYHn3olkxbDtptt_OPjLgKzmu0=&emci=46ec0b94-c099-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=c521954e-769a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Hello Peter, Today, we mark the 50th anniversary of the Supreme Court’s _Roe v. Wade_ decision — the first since another Court overturned it last summer. **Now, abortion is completely illegal in 13 states. Republican politicians have threatened access in even more states — including right here in North Carolina.** For nearly half a century, Americans knew that their right to decide their own reproductive futures was protected under the constitution. That’s one of the most fundamental rights we can have, and Democrats are determined to restore it wherever we can. clean_body: Now, Roe is gone. But we’re not giving up the fight. | Hello Peter, Today, we mark the 50th anniversary of the Supreme Court’s Roe v. Wade decision — the first since another Court overturned it last summer. Now, abortion is completely illegal in 13 states. Republican politicians have threatened access in even more states — including right here in North Carolina. For nearly half a century, Americans knew that their right to decide their own reproductive futures was protected under the constitution. That’s one of the most fundamental rights we can have, and Democrats are determined to restore it wherever we can. Until then, we have to ensure that Republicans can’t restrict reproductive rights anywhere else. Let me be clear: In North Carolina, you have the right to receive reproductive medical care, and I’ll fight to protect that right with every power at my disposal. However, Republicans in Raleigh are determined to push through restrictive legislation that rolls back access to some care. name: Candace Owens
subject: You’re a weird person… Want to know why?
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231314:6cro6dGNE:m:1:3331421248:A1E64E7425C60F487252FB00F3803178:r)

Peter,

You are not normal.

Some would call you strange.

In fact, the media, our deranged culture, and our government may even consider you dangerous...

Why?

**Because you love our country, FIGHT for Faith, Family, and Freedom, and see through the lies of victimhood culture and the media. **

This makes you a weirdo in today's society.

Well, it makes me a weirdo too. A proud one.

However, I've been called much nastier than weirdo. I've been called racist, an "Uncle Tom," evil, a Nazi, Hitler, the Devil, and every name in the book. The media and unhinged social media activists have even attacked my children with nasty messages.

Why?

Because as a young black woman, the media DOES NOT want me to believe in Faith, Family, and Freedom. I'm not _" allowed"_ to speak out against what's happening in our public schools and how the media and the culture of victimhood are destroying the lives of minorities in our inner cities.

_Well, I refuse to let the fear of being a "weirdo" stop me from fighting for our country_.

**Which is why I am asking you to join me, and thousands of other "weirdos," to support the BLEXIT Foundation!**

The BLEXIT Foundation is my non-profit organization dedicated to uplifting and empowering minorities with our message of independence, entrepreneurship, and the importance of Faith, Family, and Freedom. The BLEXIT movement is fostering patriotism in Black America, and destroying the culture of victimhood the media is forcing upon young minorities.

[_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation reach our fundraising goal of $10,000 by making a donation of any amount! **_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231314:6cro6dGNE:m:1:3331421248:A1E64E7425C60F487252FB00F3803178:r)

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231315:6cro6dGNE:m:1:3331421248:A1E64E7425C60F487252FB00F3803178:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231316:6cro6dGNE:m:1:3331421248:A1E64E7425C60F487252FB00F3803178:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231317:6cro6dGNE:m:1:3331421248:A1E64E7425C60F487252FB00F3803178:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231318:6cro6dGNE:m:1:3331421248:A1E64E7425C60F487252FB00F3803178:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231319:6cro6dGNE:m:1:3331421248:A1E64E7425C60F487252FB00F3803178:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231320:6cro6dGNE:m:1:3331421248:A1E64E7425C60F487252FB00F3803178:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231321:6cro6dGNE:m:1:3331421248:A1E64E7425C60F487252FB00F3803178:r)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231322:6cro6dGNE:m:1:3331421248:A1E64E7425C60F487252FB00F3803178:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231314:6cro6dGNE:m:1:3331421248:A1E64E7425C60F487252FB00F3803178:r)

I know this is a long email... Please keep reading so I can tell you more about the BLEXIT movement, our 14,000 members, and something **BIG** at the end of this message.

The BLEXIT movement, our family of proud 'weirdos', has over 14,000 members, and 60,000 grassroots supporters with chapters in 43 states and D.C.

**The BLEXIT family is dedicated to changing the direction of our country and culture. **

Here is how the BLEXIT Foundation fights for Faith, Family, and Freedom:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231314:6cro6dGNE:m:1:3331421248:A1E64E7425C60F487252FB00F3803178:r)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231314:6cro6dGNE:m:1:3331421248:A1E64E7425C60F487252FB00F3803178:r)

* **Fostering Black Patriotism:** Critical Race Theory does not solve race relations in our country. Nor does teaching young people in urban communities to distrust or even hate police officers.

This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes fostering patriotism in urban communities will heal communities. We also believe teaching REAL American history will cultivate better-educated and more predictive citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation foster patriotism in Black America by donating here >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231314:6cro6dGNE:m:1:3331421248:A1E64E7425C60F487252FB00F3803178:r)

* **Faith and Family:** Strong family bonds and a belief in our Savior, Jesus Christ, is our GREATEST defense against a sick culture, division, and the Woke agenda. We teach the importance of supporting families and how the nuclear family can heal urban communities.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation's mission by helping us reach our $10,000 goal! You can make a donation of any amount by clicking here. **_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231314:6cro6dGNE:m:1:3331421248:A1E64E7425C60F487252FB00F3803178:r)

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231323:6cro6dGNE:m:1:3331421248:A1E64E7425C60F487252FB00F3803178:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231316:6cro6dGNE:m:1:3331421248:A1E64E7425C60F487252FB00F3803178:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231317:6cro6dGNE:m:1:3331421248:A1E64E7425C60F487252FB00F3803178:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231318:6cro6dGNE:m:1:3331421248:A1E64E7425C60F487252FB00F3803178:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231319:6cro6dGNE:m:1:3331421248:A1E64E7425C60F487252FB00F3803178:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231320:6cro6dGNE:m:1:3331421248:A1E64E7425C60F487252FB00F3803178:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231321:6cro6dGNE:m:1:3331421248:A1E64E7425C60F487252FB00F3803178:r)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231322:6cro6dGNE:m:1:3331421248:A1E64E7425C60F487252FB00F3803178:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231314:6cro6dGNE:m:1:3331421248:A1E64E7425C60F487252FB00F3803178:r)

Okay... I promised you something BIG at the end of this email.

**Do you want to know the ultimate goal of the public school system, the media, victimhood culture, and the Woke agenda? I can unmask their dirty secret right now ...**

_Here it is ... Their goal is destroying the nuclear famil_y.

It sounds so simple.

And it is.

Once these radicals separate fathers from their children, teach kids to reject family values, skip family dinners, and destroy the family unit... it's game over for the United States. In many ways, the family is our last defense against the Woke agenda, the media, public schools, and even our government.

It's no secret Black families are a primary target of the enemies of liberty.

They wish to remove fathers from Black families, shatter trust in the institution, and have young minorities turn to the government or false idols for solutions, rather than their family or God.

You and I CANNOT allow them to win this fight.

Please help the BLEXIT Foundation fight for our country, empower minority communities with our message, and win the hearts and minds of thousands.

As I said in the beginning of this email... You and I are weird.

We believe in Faith, Family, and Freedom. And we're willing to fight for it.

[_**I 'm asking you to be different today. Please consider making a gift of ANY amount by clicking here. **_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231314:6cro6dGNE:m:1:3331421248:A1E64E7425C60F487252FB00F3803178:r)

Thank you for everything,

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

clean_body: Peter, You are not normal. Some would call you strange. In fact, the media, our deranged culture, and our government may even consider you dangerous... Why? Because you love our country, FIGHT for Faith, Family, and Freedom, and see through the lies of victimhood culture and the media. This makes you a weirdo in today's society. Well, it makes me a weirdo too. A proud one. However, I've been called much nastier than weirdo. I've been called racist, an "Uncle Tom," evil, a Nazi, Hitler, the Devil, and every name in the book. The media and unhinged social media activists have even attacked my children with nasty messages. Why? Because as a young black woman, the media DOES NOT want me to believe in Faith, Family, and Freedom. I'm not " allowed" to speak out against what's happening in our public schools and how the media and the culture of victimhood are destroying the lives of minorities in our inner cities. Well, I refuse to let the fear of being a "weirdo" stop me from fighting for our country. Which is why I am asking you to join me, and thousands of other "weirdos," to support the BLEXIT Foundation! The BLEXIT Foundation is my non-profit organization dedicated to uplifting and empowering minorities with our message of independence, entrepreneurship, and the importance of Faith, Family, and Freedom. The BLEXIT movement is fostering patriotism in Black America, and destroying the culture of victimhood the media is forcing upon young minorities. I know this is a long email... Please keep reading so I can tell you more about the BLEXIT movement, our 14,000 members, and something BIG at the end of this message. The BLEXIT movement, our family of proud 'weirdos', has over 14,000 members, and 60,000 grassroots supporters with chapters in 43 states and D.C. The BLEXIT family is dedicated to changing the direction of our country and culture. Here is how the BLEXIT Foundation fights for Faith, Family, and Freedom: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Fostering Black Patriotism: Critical Race Theory does not solve race relations in our country. Nor does teaching young people in urban communities to distrust or even hate police officers. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes fostering patriotism in urban communities will heal communities. We also believe teaching REAL American history will cultivate better-educated and more predictive citizens. Faith and Family: Strong family bonds and a belief in our Savior, Jesus Christ, is our GREATEST defense against a sick culture, division, and the Woke agenda. We teach the importance of supporting families and how the nuclear family can heal urban communities. Okay... I promised you something BIG at the end of this email. Do you want to know the ultimate goal of the public school system, the media, victimhood culture, and the Woke agenda? I can unmask their dirty secret right now ... Here it is ... Their goal is destroying the nuclear family. It sounds so simple. And it is. Once these radicals separate fathers from their children, teach kids to reject family values, skip family dinners, and destroy the family unit... it's game over for the United States. In many ways, the family is our last defense against the Woke agenda, the media, public schools, and even our government. It's no secret Black families are a primary target of the enemies of liberty. They wish to remove fathers from Black families, shatter trust in the institution, and have young minorities turn to the government or false idols for solutions, rather than their family or God. You and I CANNOT allow them to win this fight. Please help the BLEXIT Foundation fight for our country, empower minority communities with our message, and win the hearts and minds of thousands. As I said in the beginning of this email... You and I are weird. We believe in Faith, Family, and Freedom. And we're willing to fight for it. Thank you for everything, Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation BLEXIT Foundation is a 501(c)3 non-profit organization, as such, donations to BLEXIT Foundation are tax deductible under the IRS code. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: “What happened to my country?”
body:
It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools

| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ec713b5a47ca461bb82f0faf4f73cf19&_e=b5ordh-Drx1LCCrSw5vEy3BUw5ZhS7OZ5n1AgU9IP7Z5skP0nNsebYkD8UEsFPpmNcoUDnxbVjwJO-w5S5NogXwYjFbLqenxdu4Qrc1hlMGz41-oiQEltMADMhHzMOw25wIJheWz8p1nrmWGijKWeKlKcUhfCktZcvm7hMfi1jMGjowohX-c0gNg8VJEX6YBLjSJ8DjYCmqVDKV3ZdY3Tmr-W47Efy7CHpRxHZCfOI6pUTyV6m097ALMVGUNUZEsohpavTqCetCy3_GWUFPML1Q37YxqjL7SvcLEhK6xqX4eKedoMmzq-9lvTRAo-XGUpUKKBm5FapuDV9_rZ-aMMyNMvJWxvE8RPukQ_Wpd1rWY3D41JlIh2ibCkSkHW0JR3NRL7fp0ps8VxTIHmo9NlA%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, **" The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism."**
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ec713b5a47ca461bb82f0faf4f73cf19&_e=b5ordh-Drx1LCCrSw5vEy3BUw5ZhS7OZ5n1AgU9IP7Z5skP0nNsebYkD8UEsFPpmNcoUDnxbVjwJO-w5S5NogXwYjFbLqenxdu4Qrc1hlMGz41-oiQEltMADMhHzMOw25wIJheWz8p1nrmWGijKWeKlKcUhfCktZcvm7hMfi1jMGjowohX-c0gNg8VJEX6YBLjSJ8DjYCmqVDKV3ZdY3Tmr-W47Efy7CHpRxHZCfOI6pUTyV6m097ALMVGUNUZEsHuQUYIrgRJCCFf9yyfZEE1fzDa65PCkbIauWVTCrOYeWWLcZkzUsd5E10mM3Xff99sachqn3TtbrZsB_sO9OmMgl1fxc3LPTEraejxdluMcLTitZ0udU9SYbT5SqViGB-Z751kpassZ0IQfVxbLGHw%3D%3D)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ec713b5a47ca461bb82f0faf4f73cf19&_e=b5ordh-Drx1LCCrSw5vEy3BUw5ZhS7OZ5n1AgU9IP7Z5skP0nNsebYkD8UEsFPpmNcoUDnxbVjwJO-w5S5NogXwYjFbLqenxdu4Qrc1hlMGz41-oiQEltMADMhHzMOw25wIJheWz8p1nrmWGijKWeKlKcUhfCktZcvm7hMfi1jMGjowohX-c0gNg8VJEX6YBLjSJ8DjYCmqVDKV3ZdY3Tmr-W47Efy7CHpRxHZCfOI6pUTyV6m097ALMVGUNUZEsguBnDV4G8c-awgIej0S37KeESt-uIy_ZYlZ8BWmfzUW6NL9kJU2YNm6mGfTzAkKeVi8c94cZEioEWT1TVKDe5-GQJRZGhOVgrWma2hYlA9_OluaJfkIWH3WSHQq3X1_hXb-wo8hNbFHS0fnDHnuobA%3D%3D)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: Abortion access in America is in crisis.

body:
The only way we can ensure our reproductive rights are protected is by taking back the House Majority and taking the Speaker’s gavel from Kevin McCarthy.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57647704/388642043/-2053298293?refcode=em_fr_2023.01.22_b1_as_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzFhOTNiMS03ZTlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KxSUOXnZo1mdYDAQumOysIB1Fdo-CD83nDmDgS3Vluc=)

Friends, I’m reaching out to you today on the 50th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade._ **Today, abortion access in America is in crisis.** It’s been six months since the Supreme Court stripped us of our fundamental right to make our own health care decisions, and the consequences have been disastrous. As a pro-choice champion, I helped pass the strongest reproductive rights law in the country so that abortion is protected in Oregon and is still legal today. I will always fight to protect abortion rights and push back against efforts to put these decisions in the hands of the government. **But let me be clear: Republicans had been working towards this reality for a long time. The only way we can ensure our reproductive rights are protected is by taking back the House Majority and taking the Speaker’s gavel from Kevin McCarthy.** [**Can you please chip in to my campaign today to help me fight for our rights? clean_body: The only way we can ensure our reproductive rights are protected is by taking back the House Majority and taking the Speaker’s gavel from Kevin McCarthy. = Friends, I’m reaching out to you today on the 50th anniversary of Roe v. Wade. Today, abortion access in America is in crisis. It’s been six months since the Supreme Court stripped us of our fundamental right to make our own health care decisions, and the consequences have been disastrous. As a pro-choice champion, I helped pass the strongest reproductive rights law in the country so that abortion is protected in Oregon and is still legal today. I will always fight to protect abortion rights and push back against efforts to put these decisions in the hands of the government. But let me be clear: Republicans had been working towards this reality for a long time. The only way we can ensure our reproductive rights are protected is by taking back the House Majority and taking the Speaker’s gavel from Kevin McCarthy. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = In solidarity, Andrea | | = Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon Andrea is fighting for Oregon, fighting for affordable quality health care, an economy that works for everyone, and clean air, land, and water. Now, Andrea's ready to show Washington what hard work can accomplish – real, meaningful change for all of us. | =

body:
Instead, it's been an agonizing 7 months. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57650837/388645645/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjgwMDk0NS04MzlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zQC4NEsgJHlMHCqWdtOxgRiJZg4xyXLWQL9FRIYDhHY=&emci=0e61cf4c-829a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=32800945-839a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=1486204)

| | Peter, today _should_ have been the 50th anniversary of Roe v. Wade. Instead, it’s been seven agonizing months since Trump’s hand-picked anti-choice majority overturned Roe v. Wade, placing millions of women’s health in jeopardy and overturning decades of established legal precedence. And now with their razor thin majority, the House Republicans made attacking our fundamental rights their top priority. We are seeing these vile attacks both in Congress and in state houses across the country where trigger laws immediately went into effect last summer. But you know what I believe? The 2022 mid-terms proved we have the momentum on our side and millions of Americans feel just like you and I do right now. And the only way we accomplish our goals is with huge electoral wins next November. That's why I need your help right now. Yes, it’s going to take a lot of work. And I need your support like never before. [**Please chip in $5, $25, $50, or any amount you can now to put us on the path to protecting a woman’s decision once and for all!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57650838/388645646/-1023741490?refcode=0122&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjgwMDk0NS04MzlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zQC4NEsgJHlMHCqWdtOxgRiJZg4xyXLWQL9FRIYDhHY=) We must block these extremist politicians and their anti-choice agenda. And we must do it together!

The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

subject: “What happened to my country?”
body:
It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f006a2c047094c50bc2f8964a0b88618&_e=pzVzXqcQXn5P1crlr-xFMqg7xmUXk3bRVDm_vls8YpKX5C1dbVn4NeWlKLrbgHH8pkyB8u3OOqyaXqbCvUC0TZadEksSxoqbICSMpqfdsXtXzeDFNXbWgXLpFiHEicPn9VE2dPYOdBpDiGh34LCRZS6zZWH7LcyCDMnFQO4XtyfxqEG15W97fmDMzec3qvuu33ZtrRbHDP172bIqL1ULPrHR0QCae0rxJcxmUXY690W8Qy8F8Zehl163PeULFeBHE1O0KNnPDCbYBahgt1o0_e4s8_twOn0fqtX28dhAnO0C4-TV3Wy9vdl8CwDQYV40Sw7reOHRVwI7NuKpHaJAZN25DFwJJoMjebl72zt-jnv37YUsp-FHAn3M0bfi4gaIlz_wBYy6qe_fmn-FWiOjHA%3D%3D)

| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, **" The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism."**
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f006a2c047094c50bc2f8964a0b88618&_e=pzVzXqcQXn5P1crlr-xFMqg7xmUXk3bRVDm_vls8YpKX5C1dbVn4NeWlKLrbgHH8pkyB8u3OOqyaXqbCvUC0TZadEksSxoqbICSMpqfdsXtXzeDFNXbWgXLpFiHEicPn9VE2dPYOdBpDiGh34LCRZS6zZWH7LcyCDMnFQO4XtyfxqEG15W97fmDMzec3qvuu33ZtrRbHDP172bIqL1ULPrHR0QCae0rxJcxmUXY690W8Qy8F8Zehl163PeULFeBHu3rzl801zXqAMqkLQI3cmpUBfPmqv-woxE6-5kkLSSrac7grCJb7q5XdwrLt500MM9kxL5537mfXYTgGMPfFvyZl4RZaIeyFi-hfq9KEZEwoerZX0ANgamalNzYV5WHA6tiz9m4u5I0ejREK5CXaTw%3D%3D)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f006a2c047094c50bc2f8964a0b88618&_e=pzVzXqcQXn5P1crlr-xFMqg7xmUXk3bRVDm_vls8YpKX5C1dbVn4NeWlKLrbgHH8pkyB8u3OOqyaXqbCvUC0TZadEksSxoqbICSMpqfdsXtXzeDFNXbWgXLpFiHEicPn9VE2dPYOdBpDiGh34LCRZS6zZWH7LcyCDMnFQO4XtyfxqEG15W97fmDMzec3qvuu33ZtrRbHDP172bIqL1ULPrHR0QCae0rxJcxmUXY690W8Qy8F8Zehl163PeULFeBHYz2leZe-xcu8g5-uDQbcoeUp6-ER8tewMo7E4EdjC2YP9tR3UVZcw8-d119vgEFWbQNGxKRoYor1OzsrzbMVgoafCFYpLMwG_GNS3LCzmZbL77fM1as0TOGwEqzuVg-a-bbwWcMbGBDhNhLss6uqog%3D%3D)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

body:
Today is the 50th anniversary of the Roe v. Wade decision. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57651572/388649731/-633469963?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20230122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzM1MjI0Ni04YTlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CoRpLWuMoIDumw4uRDV7Aex07Pduhw_td4k5QC5aKy4=) **Fifty years ago today, the Supreme Court ruled that every American has the right to choose**. The Constitution of the United States grants us that fundamental right, and on this day in 1973, _Roe v. Wade_ affirmed it. Sadly, the far-right Supreme Court has stripped that choice from millions of Americans. They’ve rolled progress back fifty years. _For now, Coloradans are safe from the right-wing assault on our civil liberties, but not every American is so fortunate._ For pregnant women from Texas to Wisconsin, and our neighbors in Utah and Kansas, basic reproductive care is banned or almost entirely inaccessible today. And many of my Republican colleagues in the Senate want to go even further. They want a federal law to ban abortion nationwide — including right here in Colorado. Not on our watch. [**Folks, will you please split a donation between Planned Parenthood Action Fund and my team? name: United Rural Democrats
subject: 50th Anniversary of Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
Peter, today marks the... | | | Hi Peter, Today marks the 50th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ – the U.S. Supreme Court case that protected the legal right to obtain an abortion and privacy. **This past year, this milestone decision was reversed.** In June 2022, the U.S. Supreme Court officially overturned _Roe v. Wade._ The right to an abortion – which the court upheld for 49 years – was taken away from millions of Americans. **Today, abortion rights are undoubtedly at risk.** In 13 states, most abortions are banned, with many states removing any exceptions for rape or incest. Half of states are expected to try to pass abortion bans (state-by-state tracker [**here**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDBDPv4fFWda8QsNYKd9TFU-8QR6SyheQlIgprRzn45wY82gXyyc7U89mS2xCl5F47zqzj22YqXWOaltMj3ftk08S6YmcJ82_0UpVeA95YZwTTZsVQru_hiZlGOR675jCvqcV5VIvHWckLyO2Klcf0CsFLR1GfzcWmQu8zG4hTS2IhgLJMIZwZlMRPOCCaihNKs7ZEE4IbG-hd-59V21TsVprO76IH6Yc2E0JpNwDDPfLys3MMY0x7sN1lmPv5UCWGo5_gHde4JTYr-3z0vUhi__lkDlkC-3TSQVT4Ey0ms7wjG6taQzhO2VShxCNZ5RxeA/3t2/FRd7j-dLT6y7S5DYoxD45A/h0/752InFDDyO9447bllMQPFSLeBjeeNVuReiYPEPr9ypA)). Peter, the truth is that the decision to reverse _Roe_ has had a dangerous impact on the rights of women, LGBTQ+ individuals, families, people of color, and communities across the country. **The decision has not only turned the tide of reproductive rights in this country, it’s also set a dangerous precedent** for intervention into the health and rights of _all_ Americans, regardless of gender, race, or sexual identity. United Rural Democrats is committed to fighting for reproductive rights, especially for vulnerable individuals across rural America – many of whom already lack access to affordable, accessible, and quality healthcare. **Peter, abortion is healthcare, and we will continue to advocate, organize, and support the election of Democrats who will fight to protect reproductive rights for all.** We hope that you will join us today, as we mark the anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ , and everyday in the fight for reproductive rights. – United Rural Democrats **[support our work](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2GcB83DSMZPhp1RzeIEqnCBORqmTe8BL6xm_tHXVyiP2o7SBxqsANC2PTpvLfsCyAI7lI-5INibZFq31i7KinSX3jAAj8aCAWHH0Oh6KaHlKpUFGC4vp_P0C6clNHYZb4t2r6kxf8nyP8Q9RVX_pYs3tl7JtEueYIvbZjIAVYD3qOfh8x4LXkAYmPkLLgMoz39Xkhbe2M17RCXO1rx0wLcN8ExwCfGpwaL-ZVSbAgl38ZBAvWanqa8hq7cPGv3TNitweCazBv735yBoA6Akis__OuTN4yQ6uZAcckBIphYkPuNzwbde73mXQsFptJfXS2HR/3t2/FRd7j-dLT6y7S5DYoxD45A/h1/asN2yjp44fMWD3NduvVMh_P72Pt3tJS0YE_XdcFQ_iM)**

clean_body: Peter, today marks the... | | | Hi Peter, Today marks the 50th anniversary of Roe v. Wade – the U.S. Supreme Court case that protected the legal right to obtain an abortion and privacy. This past year, this milestone decision was reversed. In June 2022, the U.S. Supreme Court officially overturned Roe v. Wade. The right to an abortion – which the court upheld for 49 years – was taken away from millions of Americans. Today, abortion rights are undoubtedly at risk. In 13 states, most abortions are banned, with many states removing any exceptions for rape or incest. Half of states are expected to try to pass abortion bans (state-by-state tracker ). Peter, the truth is that the decision to reverse Roe has had a dangerous impact on the rights of women, LGBTQ+ individuals, families, people of color, and communities across the country. The decision has not only turned the tide of reproductive rights in this country, it’s also set a dangerous precedent for intervention into the health and rights of all Americans, regardless of gender, race, or sexual identity. United Rural Democrats is committed to fighting for reproductive rights, especially for vulnerable individuals across rural America – many of whom already lack access to affordable, accessible, and quality healthcare. Peter, abortion is healthcare, and we will continue to advocate, organize, and support the election of Democrats who will fight to protect reproductive rights for all. We hope that you will join us today, as we mark the anniversary of Roe v. Wade , and everyday in the fight for reproductive rights. – United Rural Democrats United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

| Hi Friend! My name is Marshall Bush and I’m emailing you on behalf of the Working Warriors Foundation.
My grandfather, the late President George H.W. Bush, taught me how to “Be a Point of Light.” To me, this means doing whatever we can to help others, help our communities, give back, and leave the world a better place than it was when we got here. | | | [](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdUcuOnDAQ_BpzA4HNAHPgMNnJ5hBttMlGkfZkGbvNOOMH4-Gh-fs0hCRSJMuSq7qry9XQFlVdsmPd1MdEtaISGlRiWppTlheUFiUrijKrJMJNrovuWCvVMFLm4ISxmSgWEWMILpPBJZe2AdkddAnyALQGDaLTpaS6Y80RcgFdYtvLOA53wk6EPuNZQrwa36erjAkx1WHySowm-CzCPKPsWrRoroLnwfElcutTmHkX-R-ThD0Lh30jYWeWE1pFkBPK-R6BMU6A0DQ67kCZySG2ed_Be5iiBAS9tFy4wRr92CmJT2F6j-TvQeluZPPHg324wchVVfA9Bm7F5OWFwwyxjwAefYYrRNHDP7u7evAjbJ5xcvr17XT9_vHlrXxFmntrFBL_gRejMLjzt9Prk5iHlyS2aliMteZe1biRftvIuof9Gy2pPxBKt7Y1JYyc3t4XF6ef7vOn9PZDpbfqizusJH3Ce3wM8LdyF8n2sCipz78AoeK3RA)

| I’m working with the Working Warrior Foundation to extend my grandfather’s legacy and support our veterans and transitioning service members.
**Right now, over 350,000 of our veterans are unemployed and almost 10% are homeless.** We owe them a debt of gratitude that can never be repaid, and that’s why the Working Warrior Foundation is helping fund efforts to create new opportunities in the civilian world.
**Our 2023 fundraising drive has just begun and we’re counting on the generosity from citizens like you to support our nation’s heroes.** | | | | [HELP US SUPPORT OUR VETERANS](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdUbtu3DAQ_BqqkyCSehYqnDs4hWHDThEkaQiaXOkY86Hj6YH7-6wUJQECEAQ4szs7nIWOVnXB27qp20R3spI96MR0LGc8p4zRglNaZJVCuMl7-t7WWjecFDk4aWwm6SpjDMFlKrjk0tGC8qbnmjcyl6zVuij7gqky56UsyhYS212mabwR_kDYI541xA_jh3STMSGmfZi9lpMJPouwLCi7Fa290MGL4MQahfUpLOI9ij8mCX-UDvsmws88J6yKoGaU8wMCU5wBoXlywoE2s0Ns936AtzBHBQh6ZYV0ozX9_aAUPqUZPJK_B6WHkd2fCPbuRqM2VSmOGISVs1cXAQvEIQJ49Bk-IMoB_tk91IOfYPeMk9Mfb7VX67eXE0daeGs0Ev-BF6MxuPOXh9eTXMbnJHZ6XI215lbVuJFh38i2h-MbHak_Ecb2ti0ljJxdv68uzj_d0-f0-lWn1-rFlRvJTnhP9xH-Vh4i2REWI_X5F2nRtco)

This year, we are partnering with a number of organizations that specialize in creating jobs, housing, and other opportunities for our service members and their families.

With a donation of just $30, you can help us create a brighter future for our veterans across our country. **[Please click here to place your secure donation or click the button below!](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdUctu2zAQ_BrqJoEiZdE-6JDGSAoELYIegrQXgiZXMhM-ZFoP-O-zUtUEKEAQ4Mzu7HAWmrIWFT-IvThkplG1asFktmGUcVoyVla8LKui1gjvaVueDsKYPScVBa-sK1Q5q5Ri9IWOPjs3mrYnbfiOGsphB3swugRUFRRhOIjMNedh6K-E3xH2gGeO6d2GLl9kbEx5G8dg1GBjKBJME8ouRXMrTQwyejkn6UIOkzwl-c8k4Q_KY99A-JFTwuoEekS50CEwpBEQGgcvPRg7esRW7xt4jWPSgGDQTirfO9veNkrjU9kuIPl3UL4ZWf3J6G6-t3pRVXKLQTo1Bn2WMEHqEkBAn_Edkurgy-6mHsMAq2ecnKvXl2f9_fT0p0JaBmcNEv-BZ2swuOOvu-d7NfU_stSYfrbO2WstcCPdupFlD9s3GiK-EcbWtiUljJxdfs8-jW_-6TG_vJj8Uv_0u4Vk93gPtx4-KzeRYguLEXH8ABnKt0Q)**

name: 4Patriots
subject: America's Biggest Threat In 2023
body:
# America's Biggest Threat In 2023
**BREAKING** - A brutal attack on North Carolina's power grid has left 45,000 residents in the dark and scrambling for a way to stay safe. In 2022 alone there have been over 70 attacks on the power grid with reports of six in Florida, five in Oregon and Washington. And according to national security experts, this trend is only going to continue. As America's power grid comes under increasing attack, will your city be the next to fall victim to this growing threat? It's a harsh reality, but one that we must face head on. **National security experts warn there is an imminent threat to the national electric grid.** In fact, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in nationwide blackouts for up to 18 months. Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment the power fails. Lights all over the country would go out, throwing people into total darkness. Without access to a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer would spoil. Your well couldn't pump any fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. You wouldn't be able to operate your radio or TV or charge your cell phone, so you'd feel isolated and cut off from your friends and family. This is not some crazy doomsday theory, but a very real and imminent threat. Retired CENTCOM General Lloyd Austin has warned that it's not a question of if, but when. [**When massive blackouts strike the U.S.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4e3115c2a1014c4ea18b94bef6455005&_e=2Rm4F6x7qsM3oM5U9uZagKg3H0C1zMKey4UjFXP7Gpw4PG1UM4gnLX7oaD8or7ycFUtFKTr-kuY9job8p_kcL3G4K51jvMnX3qUTQ4YaIOdxEOZmX8KgTRlos-HcWW0obEMWUQ2uIlWMowNVpKXU9JI2qt3pBpOcJTHvQiPAnz4pnP1s-aYC4NvZSXJomSR3zHcdvFW3i00_Qg-CIj00M_P6W9G-UY9XTsK3NO6coqHvJWcljUyq9gMky1J8MRtkhiR9jD2XQgmYZiXd_2XlkUQJwJdM97sIp5261SjiEPk%3D) Dr. Peter Pry, former CIA official and Chief of Staff of the Congressional EMP Commission, and other top national security experts have raised the alarm for years about the most vulnerable aspect of infrastructure in the United States: **Our crumbling electric grid.** When our electric grid fails, it will be like watching America have a heart attack right before your eyes, because when the heart stops pumping, everything shuts down and the patient flat lines. Our enemies could cripple our great country in a matter of minutes. Former CIA Director James Woolsey warns that an attack on America's infrastructure would, "blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year killing 9 of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse." Our enemies could just sit back and watch as we self-destruct through looting, rioting and the targeting of police officers. **Our government is woefully unprepared.** It seems like the government has been fixated on taking more and more away from people who worked hard to earn it, while doing virtually nothing to secure our nation's infrastructure. They've ignored dire warnings from national security experts about the grid's vulnerability to physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyber-attacks. **"Our death toll would be staggering"** reports FOXNews. We are all fine when the power goes out for a few hours or even days. But an extended blackout would be devastating. Will you be prepared for a crisis that could take months or even years to recover from? How will you stay safe, warm and protected? [**What will you do when the power goes out?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4e3115c2a1014c4ea18b94bef6455005&_e=2Rm4F6x7qsM3oM5U9uZagKg3H0C1zMKey4UjFXP7Gpw4PG1UM4gnLX7oaD8or7ycFUtFKTr-kuY9job8p_kcL3G4K51jvMnX3qUTQ4YaIOdxEOZmX8KgTRlos-HcWW0obEMWUQ2uIlWMowNVpKXU9DqtdbCDor9REKUISfe9qj7iYx97MJtQ-n7VpldB4Au0_sRN3Kov9Ob4gMmw0aP8tYC8yhobyqUVWbCqv97oU5cJRL60Mfa2WOvpLH59XxMmgTqPB3DZNAcL3WsxZkn5LA8Ih5zD5RABO0WJeOCHbfQ%3D) **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without** gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4e3115c2a1014c4ea18b94bef6455005&_e=2Rm4F6x7qsM3oM5U9uZagKg3H0C1zMKey4UjFXP7Gpw4PG1UM4gnLX7oaD8or7ycFUtFKTr-kuY9job8p_kcL3G4K51jvMnX3qUTQ4YaIOdxEOZmX8KgTRlos-HcWW0obEMWUQ2uIlWMowNVpKXU9FEHxD471SWw4Bbj_t6AzPsLLfBHFx4TrJRXGmfJE4f4pcpqO6MoF2jZQ7B8bqbk4X8ioixOklYt4fqyGePa_rKbQjkQxuWim7aQII-apOGyB0jq1ytaThlgcM5OUzEep6fC5t7NO_JDxbYFedehSdM%3D) **It's a breakthrough NEW device that generates continuous watts of clean, quiet and FREE renewable power.** That's enough to power lights for safety and comfort, your computer, TV or cell phone. Even small appliances like a small freezer or critical medical device that will sustain your family during a power outage. [**You can see a live demo of it in action here**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4e3115c2a1014c4ea18b94bef6455005&_e=2Rm4F6x7qsM3oM5U9uZagKg3H0C1zMKey4UjFXP7Gpw4PG1UM4gnLX7oaD8or7ycFUtFKTr-kuY9job8p_kcL3G4K51jvMnX3qUTQ4YaIOdxEOZmX8KgTRlos-HcWW0obEMWUQ2uIlWMowNVpKXU9OJuWxw-50efi-lzXNwRKU2ByOMsf-GDJB3wzKOeoInA9HwV4Kq14dELB0C4lxut3WggGcXxmHo6hJmtBJcpJLmxBa0s6xoF43CS-KX0q7qIRyA99bQCigl7DJWcLLCndcdzPfKrirOPIcHW8nf8GGs%3D) Imagine how much peace of mind you'll have right away when you get your own. Because if a crisis hits and your family asks, "When will the power come back on?" you'll calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty of electricity to power the critical items. You'll be able to power lights, preserve food, recharge cell phones and computers or keep critical medical devices going. Your home will be a little island of light and warmth in a storm - be it natural or man-made. Listen, nobody can predict the future. None of us know exactly when or how the next attack will hit our electrical grid. But from everything we see, it could be devastating. clean_body: America's Biggest Threat In 2023 BREAKING - A brutal attack on North Carolina's power grid has left 45,000 residents in the dark and scrambling for a way to stay safe. In 2022 alone there have been over 70 attacks on the power grid with reports of six in Florida, five in Oregon and Washington. And according to national security experts, this trend is only going to continue. As America's power grid comes under increasing attack, will your city be the next to fall victim to this growing threat? It's a harsh reality, but one that we must face head on. National security experts warn there is an imminent threat to the national electric grid. In fact, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in nationwide blackouts for up to 18 months. Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment the power fails. Lights all over the country would go out, throwing people into total darkness. Without access to a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer would spoil. Your well couldn't pump any fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. You wouldn't be able to operate your radio or TV or charge your cell phone, so you'd feel isolated and cut off from your friends and family. This is not some crazy doomsday theory, but a very real and imminent threat. Retired CENTCOM General Lloyd Austin has warned that it's not a question of if, but when. Dr. Peter Pry, former CIA official and Chief of Staff of the Congressional EMP Commission, and other top national security experts have raised the alarm for years about the most vulnerable aspect of infrastructure in the United States: Our crumbling electric grid. When our electric grid fails, it will be like watching America have a heart attack right before your eyes, because when the heart stops pumping, everything shuts down and the patient flat lines. Our enemies could cripple our great country in a matter of minutes. Former CIA Director James Woolsey warns that an attack on America's infrastructure would, "blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year killing 9 of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse." Our enemies could just sit back and watch as we self-destruct through looting, rioting and the targeting of police officers. Our government is woefully unprepared. It seems like the government has been fixated on taking more and more away from people who worked hard to earn it, while doing virtually nothing to secure our nation's infrastructure. They've ignored dire warnings from national security experts about the grid's vulnerability to physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyber-attacks. "Our death toll would be staggering" reports FOXNews. We are all fine when the power goes out for a few hours or even days. But an extended blackout would be devastating. Will you be prepared for a crisis that could take months or even years to recover from? How will you stay safe, warm and protected? That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator. Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and without gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the It's a breakthrough NEW device that generates continuous watts of clean, quiet and FREE renewable power. That's enough to power lights for safety and comfort, your computer, TV or cell phone. Even small appliances like a small freezer or critical medical device that will sustain your family during a power outage. Imagine how much peace of mind you'll have right away when you get your own. Because if a crisis hits and your family asks, "When will the power come back on?" you'll calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty of electricity to power the critical items. You'll be able to power lights, preserve food, recharge cell phones and computers or keep critical medical devices going. Your home will be a little island of light and warmth in a storm - be it natural or man-made. Listen, nobody can predict the future. None of us know exactly when or how the next attack will hit our electrical grid. But from everything we see, it could be devastating. Watch this video and find out for yourself... To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Welcome to our weekly Freedom Blueprint! This is where the Freedom Team will keep you up to date with America’s Governor Ron DeSantis and his work as he continues to deliver for the people of Florida.

Keep reading to see how Governor DeSantis is fighting for Florida this week.

Governor DeSantis continued to stand strong for Florida when he unveiled legislation to permanently END the COVID Cartel and ensure that the people of the Sunshine State are free from unconstitutional COVID mandates and restrictions, forever.

This legislation will permanently protect Florida families and businesses from the biomedical security state – demonstrating yet again why Florida under Governor DeSantis’ leadership is freedom’s linchpin.

The governor’s proposed legislation:

▪️ Makes Florida’s first-in-the-nation ban on vaccine passports PERMANENT

▪️ Ensures Florida students CAN NEVER BE REQUIRED to get COVID shots or wear masks to go to school

▪️ STOPS employers from hiring, firing, or discriminating against employees based on mRNA jabs

▪️ PROTECTS medical professionals’ freedom of speech – the exact opposite of California’s tyrannical new law that censors doctors who dissent from the COVID Cartel’s narrative

Florida’s First Lady jumped into action to help Floridians impacted by Hurricane Ian when she launched the Florida Disaster Fund in September. On Thursday, Governor DeSantis announced that $1 million raised through the fund will be used to help teachers and other school employees who suffered impacts from Hurricane Ian. The funds will be allocated to support school districts in five of the hardest- hit counties: Lee County, Collier County, Sarasota County, Hardee County, and DeSoto County.

Since its inception in the aftermath of Hurricane Ian, the Florida Disaster Fund has raised over $65 million to help Florida’s hardest hit communities get back on their feet.

With this administration, we know neither of those two things are going to happen.” — Governor DeSantis

body:
They’ll infiltrate conversations among Veterans about mental health or returning to civilian life after active duty tours and prey on those Veterans with nonsense about kneeling during the National Anthem and other divisive topics.
#
Derek -
According to some reports, Veterans have been the consistent target of online disinformation campaigns for more than a decade now.
They’re targets of foreign governments — and increasingly of the far-right.
They’ll infiltrate conversations among Veterans about mental health or returning to civilian life after active duty tours and prey on those Veterans with nonsense about kneeling during the National Anthem and other divisive topics.
Their aim is to send those Veterans down a digital rabbit hole that pushes them toward the far-right actors like Trump who prey on people susceptible to rhetoric about various “culture wars.”
They do it because Veteran voices are respected and trusted in their families and communities.
But too often, the result is alienation from families and friends and they are more and more enamored with wild conspiracies.
And at the extreme end, the result is a disproportionate number of Veterans part of the insurrection on January 6th.
One of our jobs at VoteVets is to build a program that connects Veterans with Veterans to fight those disinformation campaigns. To show them what is happening. To help them before they’re lost.
But that takes resources. It takes staff. It takes significant volunteer management. None of which we can do without you.
This is an important campaign. Which is why we’re asking:
[**Can you please contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford today to help VoteVets’ work connecting Veterans with Veterans to fight back against far-right disinformation campaigns? Thank you.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-jan23.jVZiAM&refcode=em230122-1-15&t=1&akid=7297%2E3013755%2ED5wVBS)

name: FPC Action Foundation
subject: We'll see the ATF in court
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UkFOTzM0NzQwIn0/VYHmoNkQKcFRrX_-AAJPog)
---
Friend, The ATF's brand new rule regarding braced firearms could brand millions of American gun owners as criminals - potentially putting them at risk of arrest and imprisonment. **If we don't stop this massive ATF power grab in its tracks, these tyrants could continue to essentially re-write federal law to target anyone for any reason they can come up with.** FPC Action Foundation, a leader in the fight to defend your Second Amendment rights, is working on _immediate_ legal action to shut down the ATF's draconian scheme. But while we're preparing for this critical legal battle, we must know how many freedom-loving Americans will speak up alongside us. [**Will you sign FPC Action Foundation's open letter in SUPPORT of our legal work right away? Our pro-freedom, pro-2A movement must speak up for our principles.**](http://trk.readactnews._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UkFOTzM0NzQwIn0/-2wYtlgOlKfgPbhdLHZOlQ)
---
[Stand with FPC Action Foundation](http://trk.readactnews._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UkFOTzM0NzQwIn0/ZG7FbfvuaG5rUGK6Sn4MKg)
---
Even if _you_ don't own a stabilizing brace today, the ATF bureaucrats could still come after YOUR firearms and Second Amendment rights tomorrow. The gun-grabbing ATF and their allies in the D.C. Establishment (from all political parties!) are used to freedom-loving Americans staying silent ... or even being vilified for peaceably speaking up for their Second Amendment rights by special interests in media and pop culture. **But while FPC Action Foundation's legal team prepares an urgent lawsuit against the ATF for this rule, it's up to all Americans to speak up together.** [**Please sign your name on FPC Action Foundation's open letter in SUPPORT of our legal fight against the ATF's unconstitutional, overreaching rule.**](http://trk.readactnews._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UkFOTzM0NzQwIn0/yPlf_lu1mnmpS-KzkSPq2g)
---
[Stand with FPC Action Foundation](http://trk.readactnews._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UkFOTzM0NzQwIn0/beFAT0T7hNE0vTmzliXw9A)
---
FPC Action Foundation is a 501(c)3 nonprofit organization focused on protecting the right to keep and bear arms and your constitutionally protected rights! Legal briefs authored by our attorneys have been cited by the U.S. Supreme Court, including in the majority opinion in _NYSRPA v. Bruen_ when the court rejected tiered scrutiny and required lower courts to apply the text of the Constitution, informed by history, in future Second Amendment cases. **Put simply: in a knock-down, drag-out legal battle with a government hell-bent on destroying freedom, gun owners can count on FPC Action Foundation to bring a FIGHT.** Thanks to the support of patriots like you, FPC Action Foundation is urgently preparing a legal response to the ATF's new rule regarding braced firearms. **But with less than 120 days left before the ATF implements this rule change, we're counting on freedom-loving Americans like you to let us know if you support our work _right away_.** [**Please, if you're with us in this fight, add your name to the open letter in SUPPORT of FPC Action Foundation's defense of your constitutionally protected rights in court.**](http://trk.readactnews._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UkFOTzM0NzQwIn0/qKMTFS4b9Gy-OCLIfbkhJw) Stay free,

clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | Friend, The ATF's brand new rule regarding braced firearms could brand millions of American gun owners as criminals - potentially putting them at risk of arrest and imprisonment. If we don't stop this massive ATF power grab in its tracks, these tyrants could continue to essentially re-write federal law to target anyone for any reason they can come up with. FPC Action Foundation, a leader in the fight to defend your Second Amendment rights, is working on immediate legal action to shut down the ATF's draconian scheme. But while we're preparing for this critical legal battle, we must know how many freedom-loving Americans will speak up alongside us. Even if you don't own a stabilizing brace today, the ATF bureaucrats could still come after YOUR firearms and Second Amendment rights tomorrow. The gun-grabbing ATF and their allies in the D.C. Establishment (from all political parties!) are used to freedom-loving Americans staying silent ... or even being vilified for peaceably speaking up for their Second Amendment rights by special interests in media and pop culture. But while FPC Action Foundation's legal team prepares an urgent lawsuit against the ATF for this rule, it's up to all Americans to speak up together. FPC Action Foundation is a 501(c)3 nonprofit organization focused on protecting the right to keep and bear arms and your constitutionally protected rights! Legal briefs authored by our attorneys have been cited by the U.S. Supreme Court, including in the majority opinion in NYSRPA v. Bruen when the court rejected tiered scrutiny and required lower courts to apply the text of the Constitution, informed by history, in future Second Amendment cases. Put simply: in a knock-down, drag-out legal battle with a government hell-bent on destroying freedom, gun owners can count on FPC Action Foundation to bring a FIGHT. Thanks to the support of patriots like you, FPC Action Foundation is urgently preparing a legal response to the ATF's new rule regarding braced firearms. But with less than 120 days left before the ATF implements this rule change, we're counting on freedom-loving Americans like you to let us know if you support our work right away. Stay free, FPC Action Foundation 5550 Painted Mirage Road, Suite 320, Las Vegas, Nevada 89149 PO Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: On the 50th Anniversary of Roe v. Wade, abortion rights have been erased for millions of women across the country who can’t afford to travel to a clinic. Today, we can live out our values and help.
body:
Abortion rights at risk and you can help.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T87243d62-f95c-47d1-b1e4-ec7bc8c3ee7e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Today is the 50th anniversary of the historic Roe V. Wade decision by the Supreme Court.** **_It would be a monumental day, except six religious zealots on our Supreme Court, including two potential criminals never truly investigated for accused harassment and/or assaults on women, and two nuts occupying seats stolen from Democrats, decided via Dobbs to make women second class citizens again last year._** _We will prevail in this fight, I promise you that. They will not succeed in keeping their morally twisted, intellectually contorted and personally cruel Dobbs decision in the long-term._ **_In the meantime, women are already dying at a statistically higher rate in states that have made abortion illegal. The National Network of Abortion Funds (NNAF) ensures women, no matter geography, gerrymandered state legislature or economic status, have access to their most basic right--control of their bodies._** [**_On this important anniversary, and knowing the sick results of the Dobbs decision,_** c**an you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or more to the NNAF to ensure more women don't become statistics?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td85785a2-51c2-49f9-bef1-cec9c60f8186/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td2b06e5a-3159-496d-956c-416a2c2fa8cd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_The Network helps with financial costs of the procedure, childcare, travel, translation (if necessary) and a place to stay. They are truly doing the work of the angels, continuing a long tradition that includes the underground railroad, to help those whom our government has abandoned or is actively trying to harm. _** [**_On this important anniversary, knowing how many women are now struggling to access basic rights to decide if they want to be parents,_** c**an you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or more to the NNAF to ensure more women don't become statistics?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1abb65c3-6fef-44fc-83d9-744a1033b783/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for your compassion and continuing to fight, Cliff

| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tae728818-10e7-4756-b601-570b4ac2a2ef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: still short (please step up before midnight)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdkM1ugzAQhJ_G3EB4jQ05cEiLkl4q9dDk0Etl_BPc2kAdk4g8fQ1Kq6qStdJ-s561R9WYlUWRA9vkiawL4FiLxNSQA8kxAKYFw1UWa8kk1SWjWHDBUZErx43NtFcqdKb_VF7Gfs7E4JKurgQuFBUaJJEVpmSjdMs3Oa5K0LSSOrF1F8J4RmSLYBfP4iMHd-VBdJlXl0s0itgrp1yrfPrB0sEhspuCez8PkxcKkeavqoNEwBbZKWmmONvw9k4EdyM3pz4ytzDuhqkPsQP6MzH0Qa2oFzZtX2_H6_Zp3N-i_N5bI6PwD3ZGxtc3b85148sXT3wtx6ux1pxZGdM5reksYcTd1ui5RuUDAlivAaz_himQIz8cnv2cEmvTPT3CaRHhMdYwj-p38m6SraEvtGy-AYlEi8c) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can’t help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who’ve been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang...while hoping that the guards wouldn’t show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they’re being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn’t even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he’s been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven’t held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Friend, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdkDFvgzAQhX-N2UD4MAYGhrQonSJlSYYskWMfwY0N1DGJ-Pc1KK2qStZJ973zO_thTXnBWAq8SiNVMxC0lZGuIYUspQA0Z5yWSagFV3lb8JxKIQVhKVqhTdI6RN_p_oZOhX5O5GCjrs4kZRR4W2HeQl5hJfJSlCWruGKlUDIydef9eCfZhsA2nMVHDfYpvOwSh49HMArYoUV7QRd_8niwJNtO3p7vw-Qkkqz5q7ZeEeCLbFHpKcw24vIiUthR6GsfmF2YsMPU-9BB_jMx9B5X1EsT706n0W5ufo9BPvdGqyD8g51W4fXNydpu3H-JyNVqfGpj9J0XIZ3rms4SRthtdDvXpHgjAOs1gPXfMPnsKA6HnZvjzJj4Iz_CdRHhPVQ_j_g7-TJJ1tAXWjTfDcKLag)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxVkMFuwyAQRL8G32zZC8bJwYe2blpFqtRLcuglIrDEpGC7BCfy3xdbadVKaKV9OwzsYF3wirEc-DpPVM1AFFompoYcaF4AFCXjxSqLteKq1BUvCymkICxHJ4zNtEcMrek-0avYT5nsXdLWlK80B01hjVrqUmpJC8pyBowecS2rxNZtCMOF0AcCm3hmH9W7mwiyzTxer9EoYo8O3RF9euZp7wjdjMEdLv3oJRLa_J3qoAjweexQmTFqG3G8EyncIMypi8zNTLh-7ELsoPxR9F3ABXXSpvC6Fefts4x7Aj901qhZ-x-2RsXfNx_OtcP7l0h8rYabsdZceBXTOS3pzGHEt63RU02qRwKwXANY9oYx0L3Y7d78lFJr05dyD6d5CE-xhmnAX-XdJFtCn2nVfAO5uoqt)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxVkM1uwyAQhJ8G32zZC4b44ENbK5UqReolOeRSEX5iUrBdghP57QtWWrUSWmm_HWZhVFtRRkgJtCkz2RLglRaZaaEEXFYAVU1otSliZVTWmtG6ElxwRErluLGF9kqF3gyfysvYL4UYXda3mGAtNBFqAydSNeWGCCblSVLGG90wkdm2D2G6IvyEYBtP8pGju_Mg-sKr2y0aReyVU-6kfH6h-egQ3s7BfVzH2QuFcPd3qoNEQNPYKWnmqO346UEEdxM35yEylxh34zyE2EH9oxiHoFY0CJvzHbyF-eKPSfwxWCOT23_YGxlf3x2d66f3L575Vk53Y625UhbTOa_ppDDibmv00iL2jADWawDrv2EO-MD3-51fcmxt_lof4JyG8BJrWCb1q3yYFGvoibLuG7pKi-I)
