clean_body: After two weeks of Republican chaos and dysfunction, it was great to be back home in NY-10. | = After all the Republican chaos, dysfunction and extremism we saw in my first two weeks in Washington, it was an incredible feeling to return back home to New York’s 10th Congressional District to listen to constituents, attend community meetings, and host my community inauguration, which unlike Washington, happened as scheduled. On Wednesday night — surrounded by my wife, my children, and my incredible colleagues and community leaders at the Brooklyn High School of the Arts — I had the honor of being sworn in as Congressman by Senator Chuck Schumer, our brilliant Senate Majority Leader, who is also now my constituent! Peter, in the last few weeks, I have told you about all that I am doing to make good on my promise to be a relentless voice to defend our democracy for all Americans — especially in the wake of the lies, misinformation, and corruption that we’re already seeing from the MAGA Republican-led majority. Of course, that commitment is part and parcel of the work that I am doing to serve and give voice to my constituents — to pass progressive policies that will even the playing field and ensure that all New Yorkers can live with dignity and pursue the American Dream. So today, as part of our new approach of writing fewer and more substantive and informative emails, I want to tell you a little about what I’ve been up to in my first week as Congressman in my community — and about the first steps I’m taking to deliver for New Yorkers. The Public Housing Emergency Response Act On Tuesday, I visited with the Red Hook Initiative, an outstanding community-based organization, and members of Red Hook East Houses Tenant Association — residents of the largest NYCHA housing complex in Brooklyn – both of whom have organized to advocate for better living conditions for their underserved community. In most NYCHA developments around New York City, including at Red Hook East, years of underinvestment have contributed to unacceptable living conditions for residents — from leaks, mold and exposed wiring, to heating and gas infrastructure that are barely functioning. My district has nearly 30 NYCHA developments, and it’s my solemn obligation to ensure that all of my constituents can have safe, dignified and comfortable living conditions for themselves and their families. That’s why Congresswoman Nydia Velazquez and I got to work right away to re-introduce the Public Housing Emergency Response Act , which would provide $32 billion in federal funds for NYCHA to make long overdue capital improvements. This bill almost passed during the last Congress, and with Republican leadership’s backward priorities, it will be an uphill battle right now. But NYCHA residents are counting on us to see this through, and I won’t stop fighting for them. Improving our Health Care System The COVID-19 pandemic exposed the critical gaps in our healthcare system that disproportionately impact low-income Americans and communities of color, and it reaffirmed that we must ensure that everyone — no matter their economic status — has access to affordable, quality health care. Part of what makes our city great is the New York City Health and Hospitals network, which works to provide care for poor, working and middle-class New Yorkers. This week, I had the pleasure of meeting with Dr. Mitchell Katz, the network’s CEO, and his staff at Gouverneur Health in the Lower East Side, which provides comprehensive care services for lower-income communities, to discuss how we can work together and ensure everyone in our community can access the care they need. In the aftermath of the pandemic, our city faces a mental health crisis that has contributed to a rise in homelessness and public safety concerns. To help address that crisis, I announced this week that I will re-introduce the Michelle Alyssa Go Act , which aims to honor her life by allowing mental health institutions with more than 16 beds to receive federal Medicaid funds to provide long-term mental health and substance abuse care for the most vulnerable Americans. Current law prohibits those institutions with more than 16 beds for mental health to receive reimbursement from Medicaid, which disproportionately impacts poor and vulnerable residents. I was proud to stand with Rep. Jerry Nadler and former Rep. Carolyn Maloney, who introduced the bill last Congress, as well as city and state elected officials and community members, to advocate for this common-sense legislation. I have already begun to reach across the aisle to find Republican co-sponsors so we can get this passed this Congress. Stay tuned for more on this critical piece of the puzzle to address mental health illness for our most vulnerable communities. Peter, after being sworn in Wednesday, I emphasized to my community that my door is always open. I am working to defend our democracy and to deliver for my constituents in NY-10, but that can only be done in partnership with our communities. Your support is fundamental to the success of everything we’re working to accomplish in Congress. I’m honored that you’re a part of this team with me, and I’m grateful for a contribution of any amount that’s meaningful to you. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for everything you do. — Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Support abortion funds for the 50th anniversary of Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| While abortion rights in this country are under greater threat than at any time in the last 50 years, there are organizations working on the frontlines whose services are more necessary than ever. Today, I hope they’ll have your support.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1610%2E5257348%2EaTx_3o)
Derek, today is the 50th anniversary of the Supreme Court’s decision in _Roe v. Wade._
While abortion rights in this country are under greater threat than at any time in the last 50 years, there are organizations working on the frontlines whose services are more necessary than ever. Today, I hope they’ll have your support.
**[Derek, will you make a contribution to these six organizations working on the ground for reproductive freedom in the states where such rights are under the greatest threat? 100% of your donation will go to these organizations.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em_abortion_funds.uwNi4W&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_CHA_GEN_AC_20230122_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1610%2E5257348%2EaTx_3o)**
* **ARC-Southeast** — an organization that provides support and resources to women seeking abortion care in the South.
* **The Center for Reproductive Rights** — a global organization protecting the right to choose.
* **The Clinic Access Support Network** — which helps connect women with the reproductive support and resources they need.
* **Whole Woman’s Health Alliance** — a collective that supports opening health clinics across the country, especially in states with restrictive laws.
* **SisterSong: Women of Color Reproductive Justice Collective** — a reproductive justice group helping women of color access equitable care.
* **The National Latina Institute for Reproductive Justice** — which works to secure the right to reproductive health and justice.

These are some of the many organizations and committed individuals helping to secure the right to choose and the broader right to equitable reproductive health care.
While this past year has been the most challenging in the last half-century for reproductive freedom, there are wins to celebrate, and popular momentum that we can build on to take more significant action.
California, Vermont, and Michigan passed ballot measures protecting reproductive freedom, while ballot initiatives restricting freedom in Kentucky, Montana, and Kansas were defeated. **It’s clear that regardless of your political party, the majority of American people support reproductive freedom.**
**[The most important work is still yet to come. Please contribute to these six organizations working to secure reproductive freedom, because 50 years after _Roe v. Wade_ was decided, the fight isn’t over.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em_abortion_funds.uwNi4W&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_CHA_GEN_AC_20230122_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=5&akid=1610%2E5257348%2EaTx_3o)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to ARC-Southeast, The Center for Reproductive Rights, The Clinic Access Support Network, Whole Woman's Health Alliance, SisterSong: Women of Color Reproductive Justice Collective, and The National Latina Institute for Reproductive Justice will go through immediately:_

| | Team, Making it easy for every eligible voter to exercise their freedom to vote is at the heart of our work here at Fair Fight Action. We’ve got the same New Year’s resolution as we’ve had for the past 6 years — protecting the freedom to vote! So we wanted to check in with you and hear about your voting experience. _Did you vote early in person or by mail? Did you cast your ballot on Election Day? What issues motivated you to vote this past year? Did you experience any obstacles while registering, voting, or making sure your vote was counted?_ This past year, voters proved that our collective power makes a tangible difference at the ballot box, despite anti-voter extremists making voting unnecessarily difficult in places across the country. **We’re laser-focused on dismantling those barriers to voting piece by piece, and your story can help shape our work.** | [**Whether your voting experience was smooth, complex, or somewhere in between, we want to hear from you. Please click here to share your story with our team, no matter where you’re located in the country:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57654493/388666170/310565663?ms=bsc_emm_ffa_20230121_e_story_V1S2&refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230121_e_story_V1S2&utm_source=bsc_emm_ffa_20230121_e_story_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWM5ZDQzYS1hZjlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DLMX6WEgF6yh8Ae4UNN_Yx99Xywfpt4Sa0EeSWrOvoo=&emci=30c9d43a-af9a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=31c9d43a-af9a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

clean_body: We want to hear from you. | | | Team, Making it easy for every eligible voter to exercise their freedom to vote is at the heart of our work here at Fair Fight Action. We’ve got the same New Year’s resolution as we’ve had for the past 6 years — protecting the freedom to vote! So we wanted to check in with you and hear about your voting experience. Did you vote early in person or by mail? Did you cast your ballot on Election Day? What issues motivated you to vote this past year? Did you experience any obstacles while registering, voting, or making sure your vote was counted? This past year, voters proved that our collective power makes a tangible difference at the ballot box, despite anti-voter extremists making voting unnecessarily difficult in places across the country. We’re laser-focused on dismantling those barriers to voting piece by piece, and your story can help shape our work. | | Thanks for your response, The Fair Fight Action team = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. Here’s why:
* In Pennsylvania, state Democrats are facing three **must-win elections** on February 7th. Without these three seats, Democrats don’t have a chance of winning chamber control this year.
* In New Hampshire, we’re only _four seats away from a majority_ , so winning the seat on February 21st would help state Democrats gain serious ground. Last year we had five special elections in this chamber, so if we can raise the funds to invest in these critical races, it could be the start of major gains for Democrats in this state!

Special elections like these could change the game for Democrats, but we're up against a tougher fight than usual: **Because these races are so consequential, they’re more expensive than ever – in fact, we're anticipating these races in Pennsylvania will cost 25% more! Republicans outraised us and are ready to pour whatever resources they need to win these races after historic losses in November.** [We can't afford to keep pace with GOP spending in these races without you. clean_body: These elections could be some of the most important elections state Democrats face in this odd-nu | | | | | The next five special elections for 2023 are just days away! These special elections could be some of the most important elections state Democrats face in this year. Here’s why: In Pennsylvania, state Democrats are facing three must-win elections on February 7th. Without these three seats, Democrats don’t have a chance of winning chamber control this year. In New Hampshire, we’re only four seats away from a majority , so winning the seat on February 21st would help state Democrats gain serious ground. Last year we had five special elections in this chamber, so if we can raise the funds to invest in these critical races, it could be the start of major gains for Democrats in this state! Special elections like these could change the game for Democrats, but we're up against a tougher fight than usual: Because these races are so consequential, they’re more expensive than ever – in fact, we're anticipating these races in Pennsylvania will cost 25% more! Republicans outraised us and are ready to pour whatever resources they need to win these races after historic losses in November. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | We’re up against GOP candidates who are anti-choice, anti-LGBTQ election deniers. If they win, they’ll create barriers at the ballot box, restrict abortion, and more. We can’t let that happen. Since Roe v. Wade, **more than 55 million American babies never got the chance to live in our amazing land of opportunity. **

Today marks the first March for Life since Roe v Wade was overturned. Today we march to celebrate the victory of lives saved and to continue defending the rights of the unborn. Every single year the Left tries to shut down this message, but every year Pro-Life Americans continue to show up. _**It is nothing short of inspiring.**_

name: NOT A DRILL >> [Update from UniteDemocrats]
subject: ABOLISH the Filibuster – 𝗦𝗔𝗩𝗘 𝙍𝙤𝙚 𝙫. 𝙒𝙖𝙙𝙚
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
Failing to act now would be disastrous

| On today's 50th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ , it's past time to abolish the filibuster and codify _Roe_ into federal Law to save reproductive rights.

**_Failing to act now would be disastrous._**

**[So today, we’re gathering Democrats to sign our petition to DEMAND Congress abolish the filibuster and SAVE abortion rights. name: Shontel Brown
subject: Today should have been an anniversary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
_Roe v. Wade_ would have been 50 this year
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57654699/388668140/-849735382?refcode=EM_C_230122RoeAnniversary_Repro_SB_30DO_4_G_TESTA_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWY3ZDAxYi1iMTlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8ukxGkLhb897MWnEy-3lSiywwl6mXPAr-iITUL2AKpg=) Peter, this year, something is different.

Today marks the 50th anniversary of abortion access for Americans through the decision of _Roe v. Wade_ , or it would have been if the Supreme Court had not struck it down in 2022. **For the first time in decades, Americans have entered the new year without federal abortion protections.** And because of that, GOP politicians across the country have lept into action to finally restrict abortion nationally. They’ve done so right here in Ohio, where they passed one of the most extreme abortion laws in the country.

These laws are unacceptable, and we need Congress to act and codify _Roe_ now. [**_Peter, w ill you sign the petition to demand Congress pass federal abortion protections?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57654700/388668141/593891301?refcode=EM_C_230122RoeAnniversary_Repro_SB_30DO_4_G_TESTA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWY3ZDAxYi1iMTlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8ukxGkLhb897MWnEy-3lSiywwl6mXPAr-iITUL2AKpg=&emci=8af7d01b-b19a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=9af7d01b-b19a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57654701/388668142/593891301?refcode=EM_C_230122RoeAnniversary_Repro_SB_30DO_4_G_TESTA_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWY3ZDAxYi1iMTlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8ukxGkLhb897MWnEy-3lSiywwl6mXPAr-iITUL2AKpg=&emci=8af7d01b-b19a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=9af7d01b-b19a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57654702/388668143/593891301?refcode=EM_C_230122RoeAnniversary_Repro_SB_30DO_4_G_TESTA_p1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWY3ZDAxYi1iMTlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8ukxGkLhb897MWnEy-3lSiywwl6mXPAr-iITUL2AKpg=&emci=8af7d01b-b19a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=9af7d01b-b19a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811) Without _Roe v. Wade_ , millions of Americans have been put at risk. We already saw the harm caused by Ohio’s law when a 10-year-old girl was forced to travel out of the state to receive an abortion. As devastating as that story was, the worst part is that until Congress restores federal abortion protections, these stories will continue to occur on a regular basis. We can’t wait for another second, Peter. Congress must act now on abortion protections.

[**_Add your name to our petition demanding Congress pass federal abortion protections. When the Supreme Court overturned _Roe_ , millions of fired-up Americans voted to hand the GOP a huge loss in the Senate and hold off a red wave in the House. Now, it’s time to demand that Congress represent the will of the people and protect abortion nationwide. Can we count on you?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57654703/388668144/-849735382?refcode=EM_C_230122RoeAnniversary_Repro_SB_30DO_4_G_TESTA_l2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWY3ZDAxYi1iMTlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8ukxGkLhb897MWnEy-3lSiywwl6mXPAr-iITUL2AKpg=) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57654704/388668145/593891301?refcode=EM_C_230122RoeAnniversary_Repro_SB_30DO_4_G_TESTA_b2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWY3ZDAxYi1iMTlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8ukxGkLhb897MWnEy-3lSiywwl6mXPAr-iITUL2AKpg=&emci=8af7d01b-b19a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=9af7d01b-b19a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811) Onwards,

Shontel Brown | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
I am still angry, outraged, and disappointed. |
#
**50 years ago today, the Supreme Court ruled that the Constitution of the United States conferred the right to choose. ** In the decades that followed, our government recognized the right to have an abortion, giving millions of people the ability to make their own personal decisions about their healthcare, their family, and their future. **But seven months ago** , the same judicial body that gave us this right decided to turn back the clock and overturned _Roe v. Wade_. Instantly, 13 states enacted complete abortion bans. Here in Wisconsin, we went back to a law from **1849** , an abortion ban Wisconsin Democrats are working hard to repeal. Anti-choice politicians and judges feel entitled to make important healthcare choices on behalf of women — that’s just wrong. The Supreme Court’s decision last June not only stripped us from the right to an abortion, but it also left room for states to enact legislation punishing women and their doctors for seeking or providing abortions. I am still angry, outraged, and disappointed, but know this: **I will not give up the fight and neither should you**. We will continue working and marching forward together in this fight for our fundamental rights, our values, and our freedom. Earlier this week, my team reached out to you asking you to sign our petition to restore our fundamental right to reproductive healthcare access. In light of the 50th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ , we want to add another 500 signatures before the end of the day to send a clear message: _We will not stand idly by as our rights are taken away._ [**So Peter, will you please add your name to our petition today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57651548/388649598/778904136?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230122_PM1_V1_S2_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGI4NzM3YS04OTlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bgsfXuGNB8CmpKWktG6jlfJkX-sEbD6SkJyJSZVAvXQ=&emci=3d6e1373-899a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=68b8737a-899a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=35007871) | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57651549/388649599/778904136?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230122_PM1_V1_S2_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGI4NzM3YS04OTlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bgsfXuGNB8CmpKWktG6jlfJkX-sEbD6SkJyJSZVAvXQ=&emci=3d6e1373-899a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=68b8737a-899a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=35007871)
---
The only way to protect abortion rights nationwide is to codify _Roe v. Wade_ , Peter.
I’ve fought long and hard to pass legislation that will restore and protect the freedom of women to make their own personal, healthcare decisions. My _Women’s Health Protection Act_ and _Reproductive Health Travel Fund Act_ will do just that by helping people across the country access the care they need and deserve without repercussions.
[**We must pass these bills in the Senate as soon as possible — add your name to our petition today and show our government you support nationwide access to abortion care.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57651550/388649600/778904136?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230122_PM1_V1_S2_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGI4NzM3YS04OTlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bgsfXuGNB8CmpKWktG6jlfJkX-sEbD6SkJyJSZVAvXQ=&emci=3d6e1373-899a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=68b8737a-899a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=35007871)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57651551/388649601/778904136?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230122_PM1_V1_S2_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGI4NzM3YS04OTlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bgsfXuGNB8CmpKWktG6jlfJkX-sEbD6SkJyJSZVAvXQ=&emci=3d6e1373-899a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=68b8737a-899a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=35007871)
---
Let’s fight for our right to choose. Thanks for standing with me.
— Tammy
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---
Tammy Baldwin for Senate
P.O. Box 696
Madison, WI 53701
United States

We will continue working and marching forward together in this fight for our fundamental rights, our values, and our freedom. Wade , we want to add another 500 signatures before the end of the day to send a clear message: We will not stand idly by as our rights are taken away. | | The only way to protect abortion rights nationwide is to codify Roe v. Wade , Peter. I’ve fought long and hard to pass legislation that will restore and protect the freedom of women to make their own personal, healthcare decisions. My Women’s Health Protection Act and Reproductive Health Travel Fund Act will do just that by helping people across the country access the care they need and deserve without repercussions. | Let’s fight for our right to choose. Thanks for standing with me. — Tammy PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE Tammy Baldwin for Senate P.O. Box 696 Madison, WI 53701 United States | |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Andy=20Biggs?=
subject: It’s time to get to work.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
Are you with me? | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=d80dce0fd3&e=fdefed58de)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
As a dedicated conservative, I’ve always remained committed to putting the best interests of the American people first.
And that’s why I’m leading the fight to hold bureaucrats accountable and demand moderates and Democrats do too.
We’ve made our demands clear and have already accomplished so much because of your support...but now we need to ramp up our efforts.
**So I’m taking on the IRS, calling for lower taxes for all Americans, and fighting to preserve innocent life.**
I’m working as hard as I can, **[but I need your help to make sure Congress hears our message and gets these things done.](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=a3ddb56be9&e=fdefed58de)** | | | | [DEMAND ACTION](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=93644ee4c6&e=fdefed58de)
---
**The IRS is a bloated bureaucracy that wastes billions of dollars every year while stifling economic growth and violating the privacy of American citizens.**

We need to put an end to this and give hard working Americans the freedom to keep more of their own money.

At the same time, we must also work to protect the lives of the unborn. Every human life is precious and should be protected under law.

**We cannot stand idly by while Democrats make it easier to take innocent lives.**

That's why I am asking for your support. With your donation, we can fight to defund the IRS, lower our income taxes, and defend the rights of the unborn with our new Republican Majority.

**[So please, help me put pressure on GOP moderates and Democrats to demand they put Americans first and tackle the real issues.](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=66bbdb868a&e=fdefed58de)**

Thank you for your support,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5
| | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=221eb1dd16&e=fdefed58de)

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: On this day 50 years ago
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57652284/388655335/1850399781?refcode=fl_email_pt_20230122roe_gv_od90ds_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWVjMGE1MS05MDlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_x7q314chzjAAdNXfgN6yKpi0RMfjY0Dr76JWtTMkmU=)
---
Team, On this day 50 years ago, the Supreme Court handed down their landmark decision in _Roe v. Wade_ , legalizing abortion at the federal level and ruling that the Constitution protects the right to reproductive choice. Sadly, after nearly five decades of legal precedent, _Roe_ was overruled last year when the conservative-controlled Court rolled back the federal right to abortion, leaving it up to the states. It was a massive step backward for our country that has put the health of millions of women in jeopardy. **I made a promise to fight for every woman’s right to choose when I was running to represent NM-02 in Congress, and in my first few weeks in office, I’m already working to uphold that promise.** Far-right Republicans wasted no time in attacking reproductive rights this January, passing a rules package that would permanently ban the use of federal funds for abortion services, as well as a bill to criminalize doctors who perform abortions. I voted against both of these anti-choice pieces of legislation, because I believe this sensitive decision belongs to a woman and her doctor, not far-right politicians. [**Today’s anniversary of _Roe_ is a reminder that we must recommit ourselves to the fight for reproductive justice and work to restore women’s right to choose at the federal level. If you’re with me, add your name to show your support for reproductive rights today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57652285/388655336/-1759145188?refcode=fl_email_pt_20230122roe_gv_od90ds_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWVjMGE1MS05MDlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_x7q314chzjAAdNXfgN6yKpi0RMfjY0Dr76JWtTMkmU=&emci=be1d094b-909a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=4eec0a51-909a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=4482565) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57652286/388655337/-1759145188?refcode=fl_email_pt_20230122roe_gv_od90ds_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWVjMGE1MS05MDlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_x7q314chzjAAdNXfgN6yKpi0RMfjY0Dr76JWtTMkmU=&emci=be1d094b-909a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=4eec0a51-909a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=4482565)
---
Thank you,
Gabe

| Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and immigrant and civil rights to Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico.

Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and immigrant and civil rights to Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Cecile Richards
subject: Re: Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
**Fifty years ago today, the Supreme Court established the constitutional right to abortion with the Roe v. Wade decision.** This landmark decision was a major victory for reproductive rights.
**But last summer, 50 years of precedent were overturned when the Supreme Court ruled on the Dobbs case, striking down Roe and ending the constitutional right to abortion in America. Republicans have spent years stacking the courts and passing extreme legislation in the states to get to this point – and they won't stop now. A national abortion ban is next. **
[**We need to fight back NOW. Will you help me hold Republicans accountable for their dangerous extremism? To stop a national abortion ban, we will need to defend our Democratic Senate majority and take back the House. Could you donate $25 right now to help prevent Republicans from ending abortion access nationwide?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57652307/388655389/-498614040?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&amount=25&refcode=jtk2185-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJjOGE4ODI3LTkwOWEtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=n33qVCcaKEP95NtpNZkk16ta4lLUEFVONAkkElw-k3E=)
Following the Supreme Court's barbaric decision, GOP-controlled state legislatures moved quickly to limit abortion rights. **_Thirteen_** states with "trigger laws" have banned abortion altogether. Overturning Roe was never the end goal – Republicans want to ban abortion completely. We have to make sure that the majority of Americans, who support keeping abortion legal, know who is coming for their rights.

In all of my time working as a reproductive rights advocate, including my tenure as president of Planned Parenthood, I have never seen a more dire moment for the future of our fundamental rights in America.
I am appalled by Republicans using their political power to take away our ability to make our own decisions about our bodies. And it will take unprecedented political activism to restore what is rightfully ours, including electing Democrats up and down the ballot and holding Republicans responsible for pushing these bans.

**But we can't do this without your urgent support, friend.**

**[So, I'm personally asking: Will you rush a $25 donation or more today to help us hold Republicans accountable and stop the attack on reproductive rights? We're only $6,931 away from our goal, and we need your critical support to help get us there.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57652308/388655390/-498614040?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&amount=25&refcode=jtk2185-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJjOGE4ODI3LTkwOWEtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=n33qVCcaKEP95NtpNZkk16ta4lLUEFVONAkkElw-k3E=)**

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: As an ad writer for Biden's 2020 campaign, it was painful to lose North Carolina, the state we lost where we came closest, losing by a little over 1%. Having AG Stein run a strong race for governor, is essential for a Biden win in 2024.
body:
Josh Stein for NC governor!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td1343d4d-6146-41e8-82e8-a7323a86ec7b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, _We have seen unprecedented anti-Semitism in the United States over the past few years since Trump, Qanon and other lunatics and conspiracies have taken hold of the GOP._ _This is one reason it's so important for us to celebrate and support the announcement by __North Carolina __Democratic __Attorney General, Josh Stein, that he's running for Governor in 2024._ _**The second reason is North Carolina's a top swing state. We need someone like Stein at the top of the statewide ticket to turn out Democrats and help Joe Biden win North Carolina's electoral votes in 2024.**_ [**_We need Josh Stein strong if we are to get Joe Biden reelected, it's that simple. Can you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Josh Stein's race for Governor of North Carolina today?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7535724b-d922-46ae-994e-4a4a59598c0d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| _As an ad writer for Biden's 2020 campaign, it was painful to lose NC, the state we lost where we came closest, losing by a little over 1%. Yet, Democratic Governor Roy Cooper has been elected twice, as has Stein for Attorney General. We've lost Senate races the last two cycles by the skin of our teeth. _ _Having AG Stein run a strong race, and win, would strike a blow vs anti-Semitism like then Attorney General Josh Shapiro's gubernatorial win in 2022 in Pennsylvania. Yet, again, with Biden trying to gain 1.5% to win the state in 2024, a strong candidate like Stein at the top of the ticket makes all the difference in the world, TRUST ME._ [**_We need Josh Stein strong if we are to get Joe Biden reelected, it's that simple. Can you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Josh Stein's race for Governor of North Carolina today?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2230255e-e1fb-45ca-b636-d2aa341b2b4a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for helping us fight anti-Semtism, elect another great governor and reelect an outstanding President._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: Senator Chase Will Present 2 Bills to Reverse Gun Control Passed in 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
It's Time to Reverse Unconstitutional Red Flag Laws & End Localities Ability to Create Gun Free Zones
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014R6DfqWgQuSOlgS8ms6WM4YhSmKt1mP87_nGFtttqMzrPVdOrV-Wo5dkMSGVEmDf_DhnzvMMbLWEnsoWGAaRtdzCdpVvL0za5XxGU2YBtiDCKs2RkHtiIwcT7GO8DBWTB_NRVhhNWePtWK0IRXhMBt24HdjCDHg2BeuRCfGjUUg=&c=e8e3BBmM4m5_6q_Rgj9oiGu24g8aXi40sh9a1qvd5sfcExlNTglbhA==&ch=g7G0O8SDAdYJjrPN-ChBJG_4BJkP2trNYccZOvwIqsZtHniNpEMK2g==)
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---|---
|
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
January 22, 2022

Press Contact:
Jody Pyles
jody@chaseforva.com
804 912 6007

Scheduling Press Interview:
Debbie Gwynn
debbie@chaseforva.com
804 393 2715

It's Time to Reverse the
2020 Virginia Gun Grab

SB1488 Reverse Unconstitutional "Red Flag" Laws
SB805 Reverse Locality Control of Gun Free Zones

Senator Chase will presenting both SB1488 to Reverse Unconstitutional "Red Flag" Laws and SB805 to Reverse Locality Control of Gun Free Zones before the Senate Judiciary Committee . Both bills seek to reverse the Gun Grab that took place in 2020.

CHESTERFIELD, VA. Virginia Senator Amanda Chase will present both SB1488 to Reverse Unconstitutional "Red Flag" Laws and SB805 to Reverse Locality Control of Gun Free Zones before the Senate Judiciary Committee. Both bills seek to reverse the Gun Grab that took place in 2020.

SB1488 is a Chase sponsored bill to Reverse Unconstitutional "Red Flag" Laws which fail to recognize that the government should NOT seize weapons from people who haven't been convicted of a crime.

"Even the New York State Supreme Court agrees. Red Flag laws are not unconstitutional. They allow the government to take away your guns without any due process. This is unamerican. Red flag laws allow individuals who are not medically trained to deny an individual their basic fundamental right to protect themselves despite the fact that they are not trained medical professionals and the person hasn't committed a crime," stated Senator Amanda Chase.

The State Supreme Court judge in Rochester, New York ruled this past December that Red Flag laws are unconstitutional.

"The Courts have said what, local district attorney Michael Allen said when the Democrats plus one Republican came after our gun rights in 2020 . Red flag laws are not only unconstitutional, 'they are a poor excuse to take people's guns and not designed in any way to address real mental health concerns,'" stated Senator Chase.

SB805 is a Chase sponsored bill to reverse a law that was passed in 2020 by the Democrat controlled General Assembly, which allows a locality to create gun free zones. Gun free zones disarm law abiding citizens who can no longer legally protect themselves. Gun free zones empower criminals and increase gun violence as criminals take advantage of disarmed law abiding citizens. Gun free zones increase the risk of guns being stolen from vehicles when conceal carry holders are forced to disarm to enter an event.

"Over the past nearly two years, we have seen a troubling trend take place with Democrat controlled legislatures and localities across Virginia misuse their authority to override both the U.S. Constitution and the Virginia Constitution which both state "the people have the right of to keep and bear Arms, and that right shall not be infringed."

The U.S. Constitution clearly states, "A well regulated Militia, being necessary to the security of a free State, the right of the people to keep and bear Arms, shall not be infringed."

The Virginia Constitution in Article I of the Bill of Rights in Section 13 states,
"That a well regulated militia, composed of the body of the people, trained to arms, is the proper, natural, and safe defense of a free state, therefore, the right of the people to keep and bear arms shall not be infringed; that standing armies, in time of peace, should be avoided as dangerous to liberty; and that in all cases the military should be under strict subordination to, and governed by, the civil power."

"It's time to honor the U.S. Constitution and strike these unconstitutional laws that are mischievous at best, allowing individuals to take away another individual's rights based on speculation and hearsay," stated Senator Chase.

Virginia Senator Amanda Chase will present both SB1488 to Reverse Unconstitutional "Red Flag" Laws and SB805 to Reverse Locality Control of Gun Free Zones to the Senate Judiciary Committee, which meets Mondays at 8am in the Pocahontas Building in Senate Room A, and Wednesdays in the Capitol, 30 minutes after session. The bills will most likely be heard this coming Wednesday or next Monday. Please reach out to the Senators who serve on the Judiciary Committee and ask them to please reverse the gun grab of 2020.

Public comments can be made in person or online at:
[https://virginia-senate.granicus.com/ViewPublisher.php?view_id=3](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014R6DfqWgQuSOlgS8ms6WM4YhSmKt1mP87_nGFtttqMzrPVdOrV-Wo5DESVJ5uk5c66qclI3xoVDbBWY1qAUrZ0rem0q9py2v489Cs66_UXsvWLKDvE30K2CVpZEf4T4jAcFTYXz-_Hl9bfHcP-3hPdd-ItJzDr2IJxN672569kX7DZBCNeJnRgrRJw2-xvH0AGRDL7wgwOc=&c=e8e3BBmM4m5_6q_Rgj9oiGu24g8aXi40sh9a1qvd5sfcExlNTglbhA==&ch=g7G0O8SDAdYJjrPN-ChBJG_4BJkP2trNYccZOvwIqsZtHniNpEMK2g==)

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Roe v. Wade, 50 years later
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57653058/388659791/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDEzNzE4My05OTlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WK0zOFmxyY5ClvJLnx5PO7woqAn32SdiHhTjLLuKRzM=&emci=e737744b-839a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=34137183-999a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215)

| | Fifty years ago today, the Supreme Court issued its historic ruling in _Roe v. Wade_ , a monumental step forward for equality, bodily autonomy, and reproductive freedom. We should be celebrating. But then the radical conservative majority on today's Court smashed the long-standing precedent—and our rights—with its appalling decision in _Dobbs_. Across the country, right-wing state legislators immediately took advantage, effectively banning abortion rights in a dozen states, and passing severe restrictions in over a dozen more. They are even trying to punish doctors in states where abortion is legal, like Oregon, when women travel to seek reproductive health care. And in just its first few days, the new Republican majority in the House of Representatives has passed an outrageous bill to criminalize abortion and restrict reproductive health care nationwide. That bill will not pass the Senate, nor would it be signed by President Biden, but it's a sign of what's to come if the Republicans win control of the Senate and the White House in 2024. The Republicans are hellbent on taking women's rights away, no matter where you live. We are living through an incredibly painful and scary time for our nation. Access to abortion and the ability to control one's own body is a fundamental right. **I am committed to keep fighting for you. And I know you'll keep fighting alongside me.** Onward. _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | name: Gabby Giffords
subject: My thoughts are with the Monterey Park community
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
Last night, tragedy unfolded in Monterey Park, California when a gunman killed ten people at a ballroom dance studio and injured ten others.
I grieve for the victims of this horrific act of violence. The ten people who died were friends, loved ones, and neighbors. Beloved members of the Monterey Park community whose lives were stolen too soon.
I grieve for the survivors of this massacre who will now have to live with the trauma of being targeted in a mass shooting event.
I grieve for the entire Monterey Park community who has lost so much.
At a time where people should have been able to safely gather to celebrate Lunar New Year’s Eve, the night instead ended in bloodshed. This is a reality we’re all too familiar with in America.
We have seen these tragedies play out time and time again. We are only twenty-two days into January, and this tragedy at Monterey Park is the 33rd mass shooting we’ve seen this year.
I am devastated. I am angered. And I will not rest until we hold our elected officials accountable to take real action to prevent these acts of violence in the future.
Please join me today in keeping the Monterey Park community in your hearts. We do not have to accept these horrific acts of violence as routine. We must continue to work together to demand change and fight for a future where our communities are truly safe from gun violence.
With courage,
Gabby Giffords

* * *
**Giffords PAC works to reduce gun violence and save lives by empowering voters with information and supporting candidates who will fight for safer gun laws. Make a donation today.**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan23.1ic_u0&refcode=em230122-1-15&t=1&akid=4075%2E3935704%2EpZBYu5)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=4075%2E3935704%2EpZBYu5) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

body:
Will you stand with us? |
---

| | | | Since the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ last year, over a dozen states banned abortion. There are even more states -- including Ohio -- where GOP lawmakers are trying to do the same. _**And if Senate Republicans had their way, abortion would be banned in all 50 states.**_ [_**I stand with the majority of Ohio voters and Americans who support _Roe_ and reproductive rights. On what would have been the 50th anniversary of _Roe_ , will you stand with us?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57653343/388660988/-1427277344?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGM1YzVhOC05ZjlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8MhTSmMI8ov24RnThxDHRhCE0RTIeQIpXD2SBNrfKaM=&emci=e0364f43-8d92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=6dc5c5a8-9f9a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=18332626)
---
| | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57653344/388660989/-1427277344?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGM1YzVhOC05ZjlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8MhTSmMI8ov24RnThxDHRhCE0RTIeQIpXD2SBNrfKaM=&emci=e0364f43-8d92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=6dc5c5a8-9f9a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=18332626)**
---
I’ve spoken to Ohioans and health care providers about these dangerous restrictions. They force clinics to close their doors. They put the health of women and girls at risk. They take away women’s freedom to make their own decisions about their health and families and put those decisions in the hands of politicians. Make no mistake -- anti-choice extremists are testing the limits of what they can get away with. Birth control could be next. Marriage equality could be next. All of our most personal decisions about our families could be at risk. I’m fighting for a measure in the Senate that would restore _Roe_ and guarantee reproductive rights across the country. I will never stop working to protect women’s -- and all Americans’ -- freedom to live their lives how they want without interference from politicians. [_**I’ve seen what this movement is capable of when we work together, and we need everyone getting involved in the fight for reproductive rights. Will you add your name?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57653345/388660990/-1427277344?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGM1YzVhOC05ZjlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8MhTSmMI8ov24RnThxDHRhCE0RTIeQIpXD2SBNrfKaM=&emci=e0364f43-8d92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=6dc5c5a8-9f9a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=18332626) With gratitude, Sherrod

clean_body: Will you stand with us? | | | | | Since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade last year, over a dozen states banned abortion. There are even more states -- including Ohio -- where GOP lawmakers are trying to do the same. And if Senate Republicans had their way, abortion would be banned in all 50 states. | | I’ve spoken to Ohioans and health care providers about these dangerous restrictions. They force clinics to close their doors. They put the health of women and girls at risk. They take away women’s freedom to make their own decisions about their health and families and put those decisions in the hands of politicians. Make no mistake -- anti-choice extremists are testing the limits of what they can get away with. Birth control could be next. Marriage equality could be next. All of our most personal decisions about our families could be at risk. I’m fighting for a measure in the Senate that would restore Roe and guarantee reproductive rights across the country. I will never stop working to protect women’s -- and all Americans’ -- freedom to live their lives how they want without interference from politicians. With gratitude, Sherrod | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible. Friends of Sherrod Brown 3867 West Market Street Ste. 289 Akron, OH 44333 United States Don't want to receive these emails anymore? =

body:
The law requires that we file our campaign finances at the end of the month.
| | |
---
Hello,

The law requires that we file our campaign finances at the end of the month. When that happens, the debt we took on in order to win here in New Hampshire will be made public.

**[Please: Chip in $3 or as much as you can before the Jan. 31 deadline to help our (victorious!) campaign pay down our debt.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57653534/388661757/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2191-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGUyMmUzNC1hMDlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jruGJAS8fcXIdOzxw85MhR5jFOfhcAJRQvDEgHAtJcA=)**

That number we post will say a lot about our campaign, and I’m hoping that I can count on you to help chip away at it.

In the final days of 2022, I was getting calls from other Senators and top-level operatives asking whether we could still really win in New Hampshire. Polls were tightening, pundits had our race as a toss-up, and the GOP was spending millions upon millions to defeat me.

Taking on debt was the right strategic choice for victory. Now, we have to handle it.

**[If I can count on you for $3, it would be a great help. clean_body: | | | | | | | Untitled Document Friend, I’m reaching out to you on behalf of my father. 2024 will be the year we Make America Great Again. AGAIN. Friend, the journey to 2024 will certainly be a difficult one. Joe Biden and the radical Left will spread FALSE narratives about us and try to hinder our 2024 campaign. However, my father refuses to stand down. Donald J. Trump will ALWAYS fight back, but he needs to know which Patriots he can count on to fight alongside him. Friend, my father requested that YOU take our Official 2024 Trump Agenda Survey. Your insight is CRITICAL and will immensely help our movement to SAVE AMERICA. Your unique link to complete the Official 2024 Trump Agenda Survey expires at 11:59 PM TONIGHT, so please hurry. Email: Thank you, Eric Trump Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | | | Peter, today marks the 50th anniversary of the _Roe v. Wade_ decision. While we should be celebrating 50 years of progress for reproductive rights and abortion access, we’re not. **Instead, we’re fired up and ready to fight like hell.**
---
Last summer, a group of right-wing extremist judges on our nation’s highest court — **_a court that was designed to protect the freedoms of ALL Americans_** — decided that they should have control over who receives reproductive healthcare and who doesn’t and overturned _Roe v. Wade_.

But they’re not the only ones to blame, Peter. **The Senate had FIFTY YEARS to codify _Roe_ , and they simply _didn’t_.**

[You know just as well as we do that the ONLY WAY to right this wrong is to elect more Black progressive champions who will fight tooth and nail for guaranteed access to safe and legal abortions and to codify _Roe v. Wade_. Make a donation of $10 to The Collective PAC today to help us do it once and for all in 2024 >>](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wk3KbH6rdH1-Ipv8EScXsAndzMcIrbisPir2uo0mBlAUivX9m2t_kVu5Mqg9NpTIkiUDy5VtVR95jFGw3dQgdZdqqKQwyvl3KVN7QCu441MC6Vrl_B7mZ-CtLCMdgyg066WCBBaGaO64_La0hhuYW3EpWZy2neU7J09C2JQbcxdxunnNHh5fA4xEYD_z6G-rQcJJzYehvFvdYbCCTlBQVbCOYqOkCfVHFG-lHWWhZUz0-uSeRwMoeE9i0WD2yfOAyT4O_LonClFl24tYQokFfw_PkT-HTookr51LhLRhcOj707XjJlnZGPQK6e-w_D-T5JPJpTq39-hKQDAwI4KH6D9YrZvYtWYl_Fx80TNMK2kQ/3t2/nfYCZdktSvqsT92YybahVQ/h1/mEl7PNZpICHYgOeXaT9-2FHgx_rz-HBSNx9Qzp1s1-4)

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | | Peter, today marks the 50th anniversary of the Roe v. Wade decision. While we should be celebrating 50 years of progress for reproductive rights and abortion access, we’re not. Instead, we’re fired up and ready to fight like hell. Last summer, a group of right-wing extremist judges on our nation’s highest court — a court that was designed to protect the freedoms of ALL Americans — decided that they should have control over who receives reproductive healthcare and who doesn’t and overturned Roe v. Wade. But they’re not the only ones to blame, Peter. The Senate had FIFTY YEARS to codify Roe , and they simply didn’t. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Here’s the thing, Peter: THERE ARE STILL NO BLACK WOMEN IN THE UNITED STATES SENATE — so it’s no secret why our rights are being stripped away with no pushback. | | | **BREAKING: Trump's Postmaster General Louis DeJoy rates himself as an "A" -- _but he says YOU can't weigh in!_**

**This is _unbelievable!**_

Trump’s Postmaster General Louis DeJoy is responsible for MASSIVE service cuts and **_years_** of sabotage of our nation’s Postal Service -- **but he just _publicly_ rated his performance as an “A”!**

Even more outrageous? **DeJoy says if YOU disagree with him, it doesn't matter because NO ONE ELSE is capable of judging his record!**

We’re launching an _**urgent**_ Live Poll to prove that we CAN and we WILL hold DeJoy accountable for everything he's done to OUR post offices. _**We need 1000 residents of Pennsylvania to weigh in by midnight, but your answer is MISSING!**_

**So, please tell us now:**
**What grade do you give Louis DeJoy’s performance?**

body:

| | I hate to bother you again, but I need ONE last push of help from my strongest supporters. I am hoping for just 1 more gift from Pennsylvania before one of my first deadlines of 2023. clean_body: | Fellow Conservative, This is an official piece of correspondence from the Vance Finance Team. We've just missed our first major weekly fundraising deadline of the year. With it only being January, this does not bode well for our projections throughout the rest of 2023. We know you understand that it truly takes a powerful movement to make a difference in the politics of this country and that difference-making depends heavily on resources. So, friend, we're asking you to please support Team Vance through a January donation. The amount we raise this year sets the tone for the next six years; starting off strong is crucial, and we know you 've supported us in the past. With growing inflation, worsening crime, and a completely open Southern Border, we need true conservative leadership now more than ever. We're working hard to raise the resources needed to drain the swamp in Washington, and we can't do it without your help. Thank you, Vance Finance Team Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by JD Vance for Senate Inc. JD Vance for Senate Inc., P.O. Box 6564 Cincinnati, OH 45206 Copyright (C) 2022 JD Vance for US Senate, All rights reserved.

body:
looking back at the past few election cycles, we’ve seen a clear pattern emerge

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57654082/388664301/227139380?refcode=20230122.2_EAV_1W&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjEwYTc5OS1hODlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bBSAzQXAGXnuYe1z_QVlv-QVMXS_pevHMmC65VhvQDc=&emci=17a85006-2198-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=5210a799-a89a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter, looking back at the past several election cycles, we’ve seen a clear pattern emerge: **_As goes Georgia, so goes the nation._** **2018:**
Georgia Democrats flipped a House seat in suburban Atlanta that had long been held by the GOP — and Democrats took back the House majority.

**2020:**
Georgia delivered its electoral college votes to the Democratic candidate for the first time in nearly 20 years, ensuring the defeat of Donald Trump and electing President Biden.

**2021:**
Georgia Democrats won not one, but TWO run-off elections, electing Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock and delivering the Senate majority to Democrats by the slimmest possible margin.

**2022:**
Georgia Democrats re-elected Reverend Raphael Warnock, helping _expand_ Democratic control of the Senate.

****2024:**
???

_That’s up to us!_**

**If we continue registering, organizing, and mobilizing voters across the state, we can elect Democrats in Georgia — AND we can win the House, Senate, and White House in 2024.**

**BUT if we grow complacent, pull back, and let the GOP outraise us and outwork us,_we could lose it all_.**

[**_Democrats’ path to victory runs through Georgia, Peter. Will you pitch in now to help us keep the Peach State BLUE?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57654083/388664302/710125701?amount=10&refcode=20230122.2_EAV_1W&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjEwYTc5OS1hODlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bBSAzQXAGXnuYe1z_QVlv-QVMXS_pevHMmC65VhvQDc=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

With the help of you and this grassroots team, we made history last November – flipping four chambers, adding three new Democratic trifectas, and defending every single majority. **But we can’t take our foot off the gas now – the stakes are too high.**
State Democrats are facing _nearly a dozen_ special elections over the next two months – some of which are vital for Democratic control – and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November.
**Electing Democratic leaders who will support President Biden’s agenda in statehouses across the country is _critical_ to building a better future in your state. But it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to own a piece of this fight and give state Democrats the resources they need to go toe-to-toe against their Republican opponents. **
As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight to defeat extremist state Republicans, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future in your state. **So can we count you in?**

clean_body: As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight to defeat extremist state Republicans | | | | | Our records show your official 2023 DLCC Membership is inactive. | SUPPORTER ID: 2023 Membership: INACTIVE Suggested Gift: $10 With the help of you and this grassroots team, we made history last November – flipping four chambers, adding three new Democratic trifectas, and defending every single majority. But we can’t take our foot off the gas now – the stakes are too high. State Democrats are facing nearly a dozen special elections over the next two months – some of which are vital for Democratic control – and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November. Electing Democratic leaders who will support President Biden’s agenda in statehouses across the country is critical to building a better future in your state. But it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to own a piece of this fight and give state Democrats the resources they need to go toe-to-toe against their Republican opponents. As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight to defeat extremist state Republicans, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future in your state. So can we count you in? name: Roe v. Wade Poll (VPP)
subject: Urgent: Do you support the Senate codifying 𝙍𝙤𝙚 𝙫. 𝙒𝙖𝙙𝙚 into federal law? >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Respond by midnight tonight
| **Millions of Americans renew the call for _Roe v. Wade_ to be codified into Federal law after SCOTUS decision allows Red States to Ban Abortions**

Listen, we’re appalled by the Supreme Court’s decision to strip Americans of the right to choose.

**But there’s hope.** If the Senate codifies _Roe v. Wade_ into federal law, reproductive rights will be saved.

We must show OVERWHELMING public support and spur the Senate into action: | [**QUICK: Do you support the Senate codifying _Roe v. Wade_ into law?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/codify-roe-v-wade-poll?source=VPP_20230122_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=6086%2E878179%2E80lHuP) | [YES, OF COURSE! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/codify-roe-v-wade-poll?source=VPP_20230122_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=6086%2E878179%2E80lHuP)
---
[NO, I DON’T »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/codify-roe-v-wade-poll?source=VPP_20230122_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=6086%2E878179%2E80lHuP)
[I’M NOT SURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/codify-roe-v-wade-poll?source=VPP_20230122_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=6086%2E878179%2E80lHuP)
**– Your exclusive poll closes at 11:59pm –**
**Republicans have been scheming on this for so long – they’re thrilled that Americans are being stripped of their reproductive rights.**

We can’t stop fighting – _we have to use our voices!_

That’s why we need to hear from YOU before midnight:
[**QUICK: Do you support the Senate codifying _Roe v. Wade_ into law?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/codify-roe-v-wade-poll?source=VPP_20230122_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=6086%2E878179%2E80lHuP) | [YES, OF COURSE! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/codify-roe-v-wade-poll?source=VPP_20230122_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=11&akid=6086%2E878179%2E80lHuP)
---
[NO, I DON’T »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/codify-roe-v-wade-poll?source=VPP_20230122_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=12&akid=6086%2E878179%2E80lHuP)
[I’M NOT SURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/codify-roe-v-wade-poll?source=VPP_20230122_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=13&akid=6086%2E878179%2E80lHuP)
**– Your exclusive poll closes at 11:59pm –**
Thank you,

_VPP_

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6086%2E878179%2E80lHuP). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6086%2E878179%2E80lHuP).**
